management: Diyagnostike pa diferansye soti nan kadyomiyopati restriktif
Preskri dyurètik ak prekosyon pou konjesyon (depandan sou preload)
Refere pou perikardiektomi (tretman definitif)
Preskri terapi anti-enflamatwa pou enfeksyon aktif
Kòmande travay TB nan kontèks klinik apwopriye
Evite dyurèz agresif (ka pwovoke ba pwodiksyon)
nursingActions: Diferansye perikardit konstrictif soti nan kadyomiyopati restriktif
Kòmande imaj apwopriye pou dyagnostik
Jere estati volim ak anpil atansyon (evite sou-dyurèz)
Refere pou evalyasyon perikardiektomi chirijikal
Kòmande evalyasyon pou kòz ki ka trete (TB)
Siveye siy ba pwodiksyon kadyak
Kòdone swen apre perikardiektomi

left: JVD ak desant y ki pwononse
right: Asit grav ki pa pwopòsyonèl ak edèm periferik
Konjesyon hepatik ak anzim fwa ki elve

medications.name: Colchicine
medications.action: Inhibe polymérisation mikrotibul pou redwi enfeksyon perikardyal
medications.pearl: Itilize pou perikardit rekiran pou anpeche pwogresyon nan konstriksyon; ajoute nan terapi NSAID.

quiz.question: Yon NP evalye yon pasyan ki gen JVD ki ogmante ak enspirasyon, asit, ak BNP nòmal. Ki sa ki pi pwobab dyagnostik la?
quiz.rationale: Siy Kussmaul (JVD ki ogmante ak enspirasyon), asit, ak BNP nòmal se karakteristik perikardit konstrictif, ki fè li distenge de kadyomiyopati restriktif.

cardiac-tamponade-mgmt-np.title: Tamponnade cardiaque – IPA
cardiac-tamponade-mgmt-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Tamponnade cardiaque – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
clinicalPearls: Triad Beck la prezan sèlman nan ~30% ka tamponad; echo bò kabann se estanda dyagnostik la
JAMEN pa bay diuretics oswa vasodilators nan tamponad (redwi preload, agrave pwodiksyon)
Alternans elektrik (varyasyon amplitid QRS soti nan bat-a-bat) se trè espesifik pou gwo efizyon perikadyak ak tamponad
cardiac-tamponade-mgmt-np.pathophysiology: Tamponad kadyak rive lè likid perikadyak akimile pi vit pase sa perikadyak la ka etann, sa ki ogmante presyon anndan perikadyak la pi wo pase presyon diastolik atriyal dwat ak apre sa presyon diastolik ventrikil dwat. Konpresyon ekstèn sa a fè chanm sou bò dwat yo efondre pandan diastole, sa ki redui gravman ranpli ventrikil yo ak pwodiksyon kadyak la.
diagnostics: Mande echokardiogram bò kabann (premye liy dyagnostik)
Idantifye efondreman diastolik atriyal dwat ak ventrikil sou echo
Mande ECG (alternans elektrik, vòltaj ba)
Evalye pou pulsus paradoxus >10 mmHg
Mande X-ray nan pwatrin (silwèt kadyak agrandi si li kwonik)
Mande CT si etioloji a pa klè
management: Mande perikardiocentesis acil pou konpwomèt hemodinamik
Preskri resisitasyon likid IV agresif pou kenbe preload
Evite diuretics, vasodilators, ak vantilasyon presyon pozitif
Mande fenèt perikadyak pou efizyon rekiran
Trete kòz ki anba a
Prepare pou posib eksplore chirijikal
nursingActions: Dyagnostike tamponad la itilize rezilta klinik ak echo
Mande perikardiocentesis acil anba gid echo
Preskri bolus likid IV pou ogmante preload
Evite medikaman ki redui preload (diuretics, nitroglycerin)
Detèmine etioloji a ak mande travay apwopriye
Mande analiz likid perikadyak (sitoj, kilti, pwoteyin, glikoz)
Planifye pou prevansyon rekirans (fenèt kont perikardiektomi)

left: Triad Beck: JVD, ipotansyon, son kè ki fèb

medications.name: IV Normal Saline Bolus
medications.action: Ogmente volim intravaskilè pou amelyore ranpli kè dwat kont konpresyon perikadyak la
medications.sideEffects: Surcharge likid si kòz la pa tamponad
medications.contra: Chòk kadyak konfime soti nan echèk ponp
medications.pearl: Mezi tanporè sèlman; tretman definitif se perikardiocentesis pou drenaj likid.

quiz.question: Yon NP evalye yon pasyan apre operasyon kadyak ak JVD, ipotansyon, ak egalizasyon presyon diastolik. Diuretics yo mande. Kisa klinisyen an ta dwe fè?
options: Administre diuretics yo jan yo te mande
Kenbe diuretics yo ak mande perikardiocentesis acil
Mande yon X-ray nan pwatrin an premye
quiz.rationale: Diuretics yo kontraendike nan tamponad paske yo redui preload. Pasyan an bezwen perikardiocentesis acil pou soulaje tamponad la.

stemi-nstemi-algorithm-np.title: Algorithme STEMI/NSTEMI – IPA
stemi-nstemi-algorithm-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Algorithme STEMI/NSTEMI – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Dyabèt (kapab kache sentòm doulè nan pwatrin)
clinicalPearls: Ekwivalan STEMI: nouvo LBBB, sendwòm Wellens (envèsyon T-wave pwofon nan V2-V3), MI pòs (depresyon ST V1-V3)
Karakteristik NSTEMI ki gen gwo risk: doulè ki kontinye, chanjman dinamik ECG, enstabilite hemodinamik, troponin ki ogmante, GRACE >140
Apre MI: DAPT pou 12 mwa (minimòm), apre sa aspirin pou tout lavi
stemi-nstemi-algorithm-np.pathophysiology: STEMI reprezante yon blokaj konplè nan atè koryen an ak iskemik transmural (tout epesè miray la), ki pwodui yon elevasyon ST sou ECG. NSTEMI enplike yon blokaj pasyèl oswa yon blokaj konplè ak koule kolateral, ki lakòz iskemik subendokadyal ak depresyon ST oswa envèsyon T-wave ak yon nivo troponin ki ogmante.
diagnostics: Mande 12-lead ECG nan 10 minit (repete chak 15-30 minit si premye a pa dyagnostik)
Mande troponin ki gen gwo sansiblite nan 0 ak 1-3 èdtan
Mande echokadyogram pou anomali mouvman miray
Mande TIMI oswa GRACE risk score pou NSTEMI
Mande angiografi koryen selon stratifikasyon risk
Mande X-ray pou evalye pou dyagnostik altènatif
management: STEMI: Mande PCI ijans ak pòt-a-balon <90 minit
STEMI: Mande fibrinoliz si PCI pa disponib nan 120 minit
NSTEMI ki gen gwo risk: Mande estrateji envazif nan 24 èdtan
Preskri DAPT: aspirin + P2Y12 inhibitè
Preskri antikoagilasyon (heparin oswa bivalirudin)
Mande beta-blocker, ACEi, ak statin ki gen gwo entansite
Preskri inhibitè glycoprotein IIb/IIIa pou PCI ki gen gwo risk
nursingActions: Detèmine algoritm jesyon STEMI vs NSTEMI
Aktive laboratwa katetè kadyak pou STEMI
Stratifye risk pasyan NSTEMI pou estrateji envazif vs konsèvatif
Preskri prevansyon segondè ki baze sou prèv nan sòti
Mande tès fonksyonèl anvan sòti pou NSTEMI ki gen ti risk si konsèvatif
Asire konsèy sou dire terapi antiplatelet doub
Mande referans pou reabilitasyon kadyak

left: Doulè nan pwatrin ak ogmantasyon troponin
Nivo TIMI ki ba (kandida estrateji konsèvatif)
right: Elevasyon ST ≥1mm nan 2+ lid ki kontig (STEMI)
Iskemik ki kontinye malgre terapi medikal

medications.name: Bivalirudin
medications.action: Dirèkteman anpeche thrombin pou anpeche fòmasyon klot pandan PCI
medications.pearl: Altènatif a heparin pandan PCI; pi kout mwatye lavi ak pi ba risk sanglòt; pa gen risk HIT.

quiz.question: Yon NP evalye yon pasyan NSTEMI ki gen doulè nan pwatrin ki kontinye, chanjman dinamik ST, ak GRACE score 165. Ki estrateji jesyon ki ta dwe mande?
options: Jesyon konsèvatif ak tès estrès nan 48 èdtan
Estrateji envazif bonè ak angiografi nan 24 èdtan
Sòti ak swivi kadyoloji an deyò
Jesyon medikal sèlman ak troponin seri
quiz.rationale: GRACE score >140 ak sentòm ki kontinye ak chanjman dinamik ECG endike NSTEMI ki gen gwo risk ki mande estrateji envazif bonè nan 24 èdtan.

heart-transplant-rejection-np.title: Rejet de greffe cardiaque – IPA
heart-transplant-rejection-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Rejet de greffe cardiaque – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Non-respekte medikaman (pi komen kòz rejè ta a)
clinicalPearls: Trip imunosupresyon: inibitè calcineurin + antimetabolit + corticosteroid
Kè transplant yo denervated: pa gen doulè nan pwatrin ak iskemik; dyspne ka sèl ekivalan anginal la
Vaskilopati allograft kadyak (rejè kwonik) se kòz prensipal echèk graft ta a
heart-transplant-rejection-np.pathophysiology: Rejè transplant kè a rive lè sistèm iminitè reseptè a rekonèt antijèn HLA donatè a kòm etranje. Rejè iperakut (minit-èdtan) enplike antikò ki deja fòme. Rejè selilè akit (semèn-mwa) se medyatè T-sèl ak enfiltasyon limfositik nan miokad la. Rejè medyatè antikò enplike antikò espesifik donatè ki lakòz aktivasyon konpleman ak domaj endotelyal.
diagnostics: Mande biyopsi endomyokad sipèvize selon pwotokòl
Mande panèl antikò espesifik donatè (DSA)
Mande ekokadyogram pou detekte diminye fonksyon LV
Mande ADN donatè ki sòti nan san (dd-cfDNA) kòm makè ki pa invazif
Mande profil ekspresyon jèn (AlloMap)
Suiv nivo medikaman imunosupresan yo
management: Diyagnostike klas rejè a selon klasifikasyon patolojik ISHLT
Preskri IV methylprednisolone pou rejè selilè akit (klas 2R+)
Mande anti-thymocyte globulin pou rejè ki gen enpòtans hemodinamik
Preskri plasmapheresis ak IVIG pou rejè medyatè antikò
Ajiste rejim imunosupresyon antretyen an
Mande biyopsi repete pou konfime repons tretman an
nursingActions: Entèprete rezilta biyopsi endomyokad yo itilize klasman ISHLT
Preskri tretman rejè selon gravite ak tip
Optimize nivo medikaman imunosupresif yo
Mande tès sipèvize rejè ki apwopriye
Evalye pou vaskilopati allograft kadyak (rejè kwonik)
Jere efè segondè imunosupresyon ak entèraksyon medikaman
Konsilte sou enpòtans respekte medikaman yo

medications.name: Tacrolimus
medications.action: Inhibe aktivasyon T-sèl pa bloke chemen calcineurin-NFAT la
medications.pearl: Pwen fondamantal nan imunosupresyon antretyen; kenbe nivo trough 8-12 ng/mL bonè, 5-8 ng/mL ta a.

medications.name: Mycophenolate Mofetil
medications.action: Inhibe sentèz purin pou siprime pwopagasyon B ak T limfosit yo
medications.pearl: Pati nan trip imunosupresyon ak tacrolimus ak steroid; swiv CBC pou leukopenia.

quiz.question: Yon reseptè transplant kè prezante ak diminye EF ak fatig. Biyopsi endomyokad montre rejè selilè klas 2R. Kisa klinisyen an ta dwe mande?
options: Obsèvasyon ak biyopsi repete nan 2 semèn
quiz.rationale: Rejè selilè akit klas 2R (modere) mande IV methylprednisolone pulse terapi (tipikman 500-1000mg chak jou pou 3 jou) ki swiv pa ajisteman nan imunosupresyon antretyen.

pulmonary-hypertension-np.title: Hypertension pulmonaire – IPA
pulmonary-hypertension-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Hypertension pulmonaire – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Maladi kè kongenital ak sendwòm Eisenmenger
Maladi kè gòch (kòz ki pi komen: PH Gwoup 2)
clinicalPearls: PH Gwoup 2 (maladi kè gòch) se kòz ki pi komen; trete maladi kè gòch ki anba a se priyorite a
Medikaman PAH espesifik (PDE5i, ERA, prostacyclins) se sèlman pou PAH Gwoup 1; danjere nan Gwoup 2
CTEPH (Gwoup 4) ka potansyèlman geri ak endarterektomi trombo-poumon
pulmonary-hypertension-np.pathophysiology: Tansyon poumon an enplike yon remodelaj pwogresif nan arteriol poumon yo atravè disfonksyon endotel, ipèrtrofi nan misk lis, ak tromboz in-situ. Dezakò ant vasokonstriktè (endothelin-1, thromboxane) ak vasodilatè (nitric oxide, prostacyclin) mennen nan yon ogmantasyon soutni nan presyon atè poumon, sa ki mennen nan echèk ventrikil dwat.
diagnostics: Mande echokardiogram pou estime presyon PA ak fonksyon RV
Mande katetè kè dwat pou dyagnostik definitif (mPAP ≥20 mmHg)
Mande tès vasoreaktivite pandan katetizasyon
Mande tès mache 6 minit pou kapasite fonksyonèl
Mande BNP/NT-proBNP pou estrès RV
Mande CT angiografi poumon (CTEPH)
Mande tès fonksyon poumon ak V/Q scan
management: Klasifye PH pa Gwoup WHO pou gide tretman
Preskri terapi espesifik PAH pou Gwoup 1 (PDE5 inhibitors, ERA, ajan chemen prostacyclin)
Mande terapi konbine an avans pou PAH ki gen gwo risk
Preskri antikoagilasyon pou CTEPH
Refer pou endarterektomi poumon pou CTEPH ki ka opere
Preskri diurè pou echèk kè dwat
Refer pou evalyasyon transplantasyon pou poumon pou maladi refraktè
nursingActions: Konfime dyagnostik la ak katetè kè dwat
Klasifye gwoup PH ak preskri terapi vize
Mande evalyasyon fonksyonèl (6MWT, klas fonksyonèl WHO)
Preskri medikaman PAH espesifik ak swiv efè segondè yo
Evalye pou CTEPH (ki ka geri ak operasyon)
Suiv fonksyon RV ak echokardiografi seri
Refer pou evalyasyon transplantasyon si ap pwogrese sou terapi maksimòm

left: Dyspnea ak efò (siy ki pi komen)
right: Efizyon perikadyal soti nan presyon RA ogmante

medications.name: Sildenafil
medications.action: Inhibe degradasyon cGMP pou ankouraje vasodilatasyon poumon atravè chemen nitric oxide
medications.sideEffects: Mal tèt, flushing, chanjman vizyèl, ipotansyon
medications.pearl: Itilize pou PAH (Gwoup 1), PA pa pou maladi kè gòch (Gwoup 2). Absoliman kontrendike ak nitrat.

medications.name: Epoprostenol
medications.action: Vasodilatè poumon pwisan ak inhibitè plaquette atravè enfizyon IV kontinyèl
medications.sideEffects: Dou nan machwè, flushing, dyare, konplikasyon ki gen rapò ak katetè
medications.pearl: Enfizyon IV kontinyèl; entèripsyon abrup ka lakòz PH rebond fatal. Egzije yon liy santral dedye.

quiz.question: An NP evalye yon pasyan ak PH ki sezyen ak HFpEF (Gwoup 2). Eske terapi PAH espesifik ta dwe preskri?
options: Non, medikaman PAH espesifik pa endike pou PH Gwoup 2; trete maladi kè gòch ki anba a
quiz.rationale: Tretman PAH espesifik yo endike sèlman pou PAH Gwoup 1. Nan PH Gwoup 2, trete maladi kè gòch ki anba a ak jesyon volim se estrateji apwopriye yo.

cerebral-venous-sinus-thrombosis-np.title: Thrombose veineuse cérébrale – IPA
cerebral-venous-sinus-thrombosis-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Thrombose veineuse cérébrale – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
clinicalPearls: CVST se inik: antikoagile menm ak emoraji intracranial (emoraji a soti nan konjesyon venoz)
Jèn fanm ki sou OCP ak mal tèt ak papilledema: panse CVST
Kriz yo pi komen nan CVST pase nan aksidan atè
cerebral-venous-sinus-thrombosis-np.pathophysiology: CVST rive lè yon thrombus fòme nan sinis venoz dural yo, ki bloke drenaj venoz nan sèvo a. Ogmantasyon nan presyon venoz la lakòz edèm vazojèn, rediksyon nan absòpsyon CSF (ogmantasyon nan presyon intracranial), ak enfaksyon venoz ak transfòmasyon emoragik. Pwosesis trombotik la souvan gen rapò ak eta hiperkoagilabl oswa enfeksyon lokal.
diagnostics: Mande CT venography oswa MR venography (estanda dyagnostik an lò)
Mande CT tèt san kontrast (ka montre siy triyang dans)
Mande D-dimer (ogmante, men pa espesifik)
Mande travay thrombophilia apre tretman akut
Mande LP si sa nesesè (ogmante presyon ouvèti)
Mande CBC ak etid koagilasyon
management: Preskri antikoagilasyon ak heparin menm si gen enfaksyon emoragik ki prezan
Transfere nan warfarin pou 3-12 mwa selon etyoloji
Mande jesyon ICP si li ogmante
Preskri terapi antiepileptik pou kriz
Sispann kontraseptif oral yo ak trete kòz ki anba a
Konsidere tromboliz endovaskilè pou ka grav
nursingActions: Dyagnostike CVST lè l sèvi avèk prezantasyon klinik ak neuroimaging
Preskri antikoagilasyon rapidman (menm ak konpozan emoragik)
Mande ak entèprete travay thrombophilia
Jere ICP ki ogmante jan sa nesesè
Preskri pwopilaksi kriz si gen enplikasyon kortikal
Konsilte sou altènativ kontraseptif si sa gen rapò ak OCP
Detèmine dire antikoagilasyon an selon etyoloji

left: Mal tèt pwogresif (siy ki pi komen)
Papilledema soti nan ICP ki ogmante
right: Herniation transtentorial soti nan edèm sèvo

medications.name: Heparin (Unfractionated)
medications.action: Aktive antithrombin III pou anpeche pwopagasyon boul
medications.sideEffects: Emoraji, HIT, osteyopowoz ak itilizasyon pwolonje
medications.pearl: Antikoagile MENM ak enfaksyon emoragik nan CVST (emoraji a se akòz konjesyon venoz, pa antikoagilan an).

quiz.question: Yon NP dyagnostike CVST ak yon ti konpozan emoragik sou CT. Ki tretman ki apwopriye a?
options: Preskri antikoagilasyon heparin malgre emoraji a
quiz.rationale: Nan CVST, antikoagilasyon endike menm ak transfòmasyon emoragik paske emoraji a soti nan konjesyon venoz, ak antikoagilasyon an anpeche pwopagasyon boul.

portal-hypertension-np.title: Hypertension portale – IPA
portal-hypertension-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Hypertension portale – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Sirozi (pi souvan kòz: alkòl, HCV, NASH)
Kè dwat echwe ki lakòz konjesyon fwa
clinicalPearls: HVPG ≥10 mmHg = tansyon pòtal klinikman enpòtan (risk varis ak asit)
Sispann NSBBs nan asit refraktè, SBP, oswa sendwòm hepatorenal (ka agrave hypotension)
Paracentesis dyagnostik: PMN >250/mm3 = peritonit bakteri spontan (trete ak ceftriaxone)
portal-hypertension-np.pathophysiology: Tansyon pòtal devlope lè fibroz fwa (anjeneral soti nan sirozi) ogmante rezistans nan koule venn pòtal atravè sinusoids fwa yo. Presyon pòtal depase 5 mmHg (klinikman enpòtan >10 mmHg), sa ki lakòz fòmasyon kolateral portosystemic (varis), vasodilatasyon splanchnic, asit, ak sendwòm hepatorenal atravè aktivasyon neurohormonal konplèks.
diagnostics: Mande mezi gradient presyon venn fwa (HVPG ≥10 klinikman enpòtan)
Mande endoskopi siperyè pou depistaj varis
Mande ultrasound abdominal ak Doppler
Mande tès fonksyon fwa ak fonksyon sentetik
Mande CBC (thrombocytopenia sijere tansyon pòtal)
Mande kalkil nòt MELD
management: Preskri beta-bloke non-selektif (NSBB) pou pwoteksyon varis
Mande ligasyon varis endoskopik (EVL) pou gwo varis
Preskri diurè pou asit (spironolactone + furosemide)
Mande paracentesis gwo volim ak albumin pou asit tansyon
Refe pou TIPS pou asit refraktè oswa senyen varis rekiran
Evalye pou transplantasyon fwa
nursingActions: Fè depistaj pou varis ak EGD epi preskri pwoteksyon
Preskri carvedilol oswa propranolol pou rediksyon presyon pòtal
Jere asit ak diurè ak restriksyon sodyòm
Mande paracentesis dyagnostik si nouvo asit oswa enkyetid pou SBP
Preskri pwoteksyon SBP ak norfloxacin pou pasyan ki nan gwo risk
Evalye pou sendwòm hepatorenal si fonksyon ren desann
Kowòdone evalyasyon transplant

right: Sendwòm hepatorenal (kreatinin ki monte, sodyòm pipi ki ba)

medications.name: Carvedilol
medications.action: Redwi presyon pòtal pa diminye pwodiksyon kadyak (beta-1) ak vasodilatasyon splanchnic (alpha-1)
medications.contra: Asit refraktè, SBP, sendwòm hepatorenal (ka agrave hypotension)
medications.pearl: Pi efikas pase propranolol pou rediksyon presyon pòtal; kòmanse ba (6.25mg BID). Sispann NSBBs si SBP <90 oswa asit refraktè devlope.

medications.name: Octreotide
medications.action: Redwi koule san splanchnic ak presyon pòtal pandan senyen varis akut
medications.pearl: Bay ak endoskopi pou senyen varis akut; kontinye enfizyon IV pou 3-5 jou.

quiz.question: Yon NP ki ap jere yon pasyan sirotik ki sou carvedilol pou pwoteksyon varis jwenn pasyan an devlope asit refraktè ak SBP <85. Ki sa ki ta dwe fèt?
quiz.rationale: NSBB yo ta dwe sispann nan asit refraktè ak hypotension (SBP <90) paske yo ka agrave hemodynamics nan sirozi dekompanse.

advanced-cardiac-auscultation-np.title: Auscultation cardiaque avancée – IPA
advanced-cardiac-auscultation-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Auscultation cardiaque avancée – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
clinicalPearls: Valsalva ak kanpe OGMANTE murmurs HCM (diminye preload agrave obstriksyon)
Squatting DIMINYE murmurs HCM (ogmante preload ak afterload diminye obstriksyon)
Tout murmurs diastolik ak nenpòt nouvo murmur nan yon granmoun aje mande evalyasyon echokardiografik
advanced-cardiac-auscultation-np.pathophysiology: Son kè ak murmurs yo reflete gradient presyon ak dinamik koule atravè valv yo. Entansite murmurs la korèl ak vitès koule ak gradient presyon. Manèv ki chanje preload ak afterload chanje karakteristik murmurs yo dyagnostikman: Valsalva diminye preload (ogmante murmurs HCM, diminye pifò lòt); squatting ogmante preload ak afterload (diminye HCM, ogmante aortic stenosis).
diagnostics: Kòmande echokardiogram pou karakterizasyon murmurs
Kòmande auscultation dinamik ak manèv
Kòmande echo transesophageal pou evalyasyon valv pwotetik
Kòmande kateterizasyon kadyak pou korelasyon hemodinamik
management: Dyagnostike patoloji valv la selon karakteristik murmurs ak manèv
Kòmande imaj ki apwopriye pou konfime rezilta auscultatory yo
Preskri jesyon medikal selon gravite maladi valv la
Refer pou evalyasyon chirijikal lè sa nesesè
Kòmande siveyans seri pou maladi valv pwogresif
nursingActions: Fè auscultation sistematik ak manèv dinamik
Diferansye murmurs sistolik ak diastolik
Kòmande echokardiografi konfimasyon
Detèmine gravite fonksyonèl itilize done klinik ak echo
Preskri entèval swiv apwopriye
Idantifye murmurs ki gen drapo wouj ki mande evalyasyon ijan

left: Murmur koule inosan (dou, sistolik, klas I-II)
Klike mitral valv prolaps nan mitan sistol
right: Murmur sistolik kreshendo-dekresendo ki gen radiasyon nan karotid (aortic stenosis)
Murmur holosystolic nan apex ki radye nan axilla (mitral regurgitation)
Murmur diastolik dekresendo nan bò gòch sternum (aortic regurgitation)
Kle ouvèti ak rumble diastolik nan apex (mitral stenosis)

medications.name: Amyl Nitrite
medications.action: Diminye preload ak afterload; itilize pou diferansye murmurs pandan auscultation
medications.pearl: Ogmente murmurs HCM (mwens san pou obstrui); diminye murmurs aortic stenosis (mwens koule atravè valv la).

quiz.question: Yon NP tande yon murmur sistolik ki vin pi fò lè pasyan an fè Valsalva. Ki dyagnostik ki pi pwobab la?
quiz.rationale: Murmur HCM ogmante ak diminye preload (Valsalva, kanpe) paske volim ventrikil diminye agrave obstriksyon koule a.

hemodynamic-monitoring-np.title: Surveillance hémodynamique – IPA
hemodynamic-monitoring-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Surveillance hémodynamique – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
clinicalPearls: Pwofil hemodinamik: Kadyojanik = wedge wo + CO ba + SVR wo; Septik = wedge ba-nòmal + CO wo + SVR ba
SvO2 <60% = tisi yo ap ekstrè plis oksijèn pase nòmal (livrezon ki pa adekwa oswa demann ki ogmante)
Reponsivite likid: evalye ak leve janm pasif oswa varyasyon presyon puls, pa sèlman CVP
hemodynamic-monitoring-np.pathophysiology: Katè pulmo a bay mezi presyon dirèk ki reflete fonksyon chanm yo. CVP reflete RV preload. PA systolic reflete RV afterload. PAWP (wedge) reflete LV preload. Thermodilution cardiac output mezire fonksyon ponp lan. Ansanm, paramèt sa yo fè distenksyon ant kalite chòk yo epi gide titrasyon medikaman vasoaktif yo.
diagnostics: Mande plasman katè PA pou evalyasyon hemodinamik
Mande mezi thermodilution cardiac output
Mande siveyans kontinyèl SvO2
Mande kalkil hemodinamik derive (SVR, PVR, CI)
Mande liy atè pou siveyans BP kontinyèl
Mande echokardiografi pwen-sou-swen kòm adjon
management: Preskri enstalasyon katè PA pou ensèten dyagnostik nan chòk
Mande pwofil hemodinamik pou gide terapi
Preskri medikaman vasoaktif selon done hemodinamik yo
Mande defi likid ak siveyans hemodinamik
Preskri inotropes pou eta ki gen pwodiksyon kadyak ki ba
Retire katè a lè objektif hemodinamik yo reyalize
nursingActions: Entèprete pwofil hemodinamik yo epi fè distenksyon ant kalite chòk yo
Preskri terapi ki vize objektif selon paramèt hemodinamik yo
Mande ak entèprete mezi pwodiksyon kadyak yo
Titrasyon medikaman vasoaktif selon objektif hemodinamik yo
Idantifye ak korije erè siveyans hemodinamik yo
Detèmine kilè siveyans envazif pa nesesè ankò
Kalkile ak entèprete paramèt derive yo (SVR, PVR, CI, SVRI)

left: Pwofil hemodinamik nòmal (CVP 2-8, PAWP 8-12, CI 2.5-4.0, SVR 800-1200)
Livrezon ak konsomasyon oksijèn ki balanse
right: Kadyojanik: PAWP wo, CI ba, SVR wo
Septik: PAWP ba (oswa nòmal), CI wo, SVR ba
Hypovolemic: PAWP ba, CI ba, SVR wo
Fè mal RV: CVP wo, PAWP ba, CI ba

medications.name: Vasopressin
medications.action: Vasopresè non-katekolamin ki ogmante SVR atravè vasokonstriksyon ki medyatize pa reseptè V1
medications.pearl: Itilize kòm dezyèm liy vasopresè nan chòk septik (0.03-0.04 inite/minit dòz fiks); efè ki ekonomize katekolamin.

quiz.question: An NP revize hemodinamik: CVP 18, PAWP 24, CI 1.6, SVR 2400. Ki kalite chòk valè sa yo endike?
quiz.rationale: PAWP wo (24), CI ba (1.6), ak SVR wo (2400) endike chòk kadyojanik - kè a ap echwe ak yon retou san ak vasokonstriksyon konpansatwa.

cardiac-output-np.title: Débit cardiaque – IPA
cardiac-output-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Débit cardiaque – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
clinicalPearls: CO = HR x SV; CO nòmal 4-8 L/min; CI nòmal 2.5-4.0 L/min/m2
Toujou evalye repons likid anvan ou bay volim (leve janm pasif, varyasyon presyon pouls)
Inotropes ogmante kontraktilite men tou ogmante demann oksijèn myokad (eksepte levosimendan)
cardiac-output-np.pathophysiology: Kapasite kadyak (CO = HR x SV) detèmine pa kat faktè: to kè, preload (mekanis Frank-Starling), afterload (rezistans vaskilè sistemik), ak kontraktilite (eta inotropik). Optimize chak detèminan endepandamman pèmèt terapi vize: volim pou preload, vasopresè/vasodilatè pou afterload, ak inotropes pou kontraktilite.
diagnostics: Mande tèmodilisyon kapasite kadyak atravè katetè PA
Mande siveyans kapasite kadyak ki pa invazif (analiz kontou pouls)
Mande estimasyon kapasite kadyak echokadyografik
Mande liy atè pou siveyans hemodinamik kontinyèl
Mande SvO2 oswa ScvO2 pou evalyasyon livrezon oksijèn
Mande klèans laktat kòm makè perfizyon
management: Preskri likid IV pou optimize preload
Preskri vasopresè pou sipò afterload
Preskri inotropes pou amelyore kontraktilite
Mande optimize to kè (pacing pou bradykadi, kontwòl to pou takykadi)
Preskri sipò sikilasyon mekanik pou kapasite ki ba ki rezistan
Mande vasodilatè pou afterload ki twòp
nursingActions: Kalkile ak entèprete kapasite kadyak ak endèks kadyak
Preskri terapi vize ki baze sou detèminan ki afekte a
Mande evalyasyon repons likid anvan chaj volim
Titrè medikaman vasoaktif pou objektif CO/CI
Siveye makè perfizyon ògàn final (laktat, UOP, eta mantal)
Idantifye mekanis konpansatwa ak limit yo
Detèmine bezwen pou sipò sikilasyon mekanik

left: Ekstremite cho ak ranpli kapilè rapid

medications.name: Levosimendan
medications.action: Sensibilize troponin C ak kalsyòm pou amelyore kontraktilite san ogmante demann oksijèn; li tou lakòz vasodilatasyon atravè chanèl K-ATP
medications.pearl: Pa ogmante demann oksijèn myokad tankou inotropes tradisyonèl; efè yo dire 7-10 jou apre enfizyon 24 èdtan.

quiz.question: Yon NP jere yon pasyan ki gen CI 1.8 malgre preload adekwat (PAWP 14) ak sipò vasopresè (SVR 1400). Ki terapi adisyonèl ki ta dwe mande?
quiz.rationale: Avèk preload ak afterload ki adekwat men CI ki toujou ba, pwoblèm nan se kontraktilite. Yon inotrope (dobutamine oswa milrinone) ta dwe ajoute.

vascular-assessment-np.title: Évaluation vasculaire – IPA
vascular-assessment-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Évaluation vasculaire – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
clinicalPearls: PAD se yon ekivalan risk kadyovaskilè - trete ak menm entansite ak CAD ki konnen
Entèpretasyon ABI: >1.3 = pa konpresib; 0.9-1.3 = nòmal; 0.5-0.89 = klodikasyon; <0.5 = iskemik kritik
Toujou tcheke ABI anvan aplike terapi konpresyon pou maladi venn
vascular-assessment-np.pathophysiology: Evalyasyon vaskilè avanse entegre istwa, egzamen fizik, ak tès ki pa envazif pou lokalize maladi, quantifier gravite, ak detèmine tan entèvansyon an. Evalyasyon maladi atè depann sou mezi presyon (ABI, presyon segmental) ak etid koule, pandan evalyasyon maladi venn evalye konpetans valv ak reflèks lè l sèvi avèk ultrasonografi duplex.
diagnostics: Lòd ABI ak tès egzèsis pou klodikasyon
Lòd presyon segmental ak anrejistreman volim pouse
Lòd CT angiography pou planifikasyon entèvansyon
Lòd duplex ultrasound pou quantification reflèks venn
Lòd presyon zòtèy ak TcPO2 pou iskemik kritik
Lòd MR angiography pou yon altènatif ki an sekirite pou ren
management: Diyagnostike ak klase gravite maladi atè ak venn
Preskri GDMT pou maladi atè (statin, antiplatelet, modifikasyon faktè risk)
Lòd revascularization pou iskemik kritik nan manm
Preskri terapi konpresyon pou maladi venn (apre konfime koule atè adekwat)
Lòd ablation venn pou reflèks sentomatik
Preskri pwotokòl swen blesi ki baze sou etyoloji ulcè
nursingActions: Fè yon egzamen fizik vaskilè konplè
Lòd ak entèprete etid vaskilè ki pa envazif
Stratifye risk pasyan yo pou entèvansyon kont jesyon konsèvatif
Preskri terapi medikal ki baze sou prèv
Kowòdone referans pou chiriji vaskilè oswa radyoloji entèvansyonèl
Lòd siveyans apre pwosedi
Jere blesi konplèks ak yon apwòch miltidisiplinè

left: Varykosite lejè san chanjman sou po a
Edèm cheviy ki amelyore ak elevasyon
right: Pulsasyon ki absan ak doulè nan repo

medications.name: Atorvastatin
medications.action: Redwi LDL cholesterol ak estabilize plak aterosklerotik
medications.pearl: Statin ki gen entansite wo (40-80mg) endike pou tout pasyan PAD kèlkeswa LDL baz la.

quiz.question: Yon NP evalye yon pasyan ki gen maladi atè-venn melanje. ABI se 0.6 ak reflèks venn enpòtan. Ki modifikasyon ki nesesè pou terapi konpresyon?
options: Pa gen terapi konpresyon ki pèmèt
Konpresyon modifye (20-30 mmHg) ak siveyans sere
quiz.rationale: Avèk maladi melanje (ABI 0.5-0.8), konpresyon ki gen presyon ki pi ba modifye (20-30 mmHg) ka itilize ak prekosyon pou jere maladi venn san yo pa agrave ensifizans atè.

polymyalgia-rheumatica-np.title: Polymyalgia Rheumatica (NP)
polymyalgia-rheumatica-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Polymyalgia Rheumatica (NP), ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
clinicalPearls: PMR reponn dramatikman a prednisone nan dòz ba (12.5-25mg) nan 1-3 jou; mank de repons = reconsidere dyagnostik
Toujou fè tès pou GCA: nouvo doulè tèt, klodikasyon machwè, oswa chanjman vizyon = steroid ki bezwen an ijans
CK se NÒM nan PMR (CK ki ogmante sijere myozit, pa PMR)
polymyalgia-rheumatica-np.pathophysiology: Polymyalgia rheumatica (PMR) se yon kondisyon enfektye sistemik ki afekte estrikti periartikilè (bursae, synovium) nan zepòl ak ranch. IL-6 ki ogmante kondwi repons faz akit. PMR gen yon relasyon sere ak arterit selil jeyan (GCA), kote 15-20% nan pasyan PMR devlope GCA, ki ka lakòz pèt vizyon ki pa ka geri akòz enfeksyon nan atè ophtalmik.
diagnostics: Lòd ESR ak CRP (ki ogmante anpil)
Lòd CBC (anemi normochromic normocytic komen)
Lòd CK (nòmal, pou fè diferans ak myozit)
Lòd biyopsi atè tanporèl si GCA sispèk
Lòd ultrasound nan zepòl pou bursit
Lòd tès fonksyon fwa anvan inisyalizasyon steroid
management: Preskri prednisone nan dòz ba (12.5-25mg chak jou) kòm premye liy
Lòd taper rapid sou 12-18 mwa selon repons sentòm
Preskri methotrexate kòm ajan ki diminye itilizasyon steroid pou rekidiv
Fè tès pou ak jere efè segondè steroid
Preskri kalsyòm ak vitamin D pou pwoteksyon zo
Lòd eskan zo dansite anvan itilizasyon steroid pwolonje
nursingActions: Dyagnostike PMR selon kritè klinik ak makè enfektye
Preskri terapi corticosteroid ak swiv repons
Fè tès pou GCA ki an paralèl nan chak vizit
Lòd orè taper steroid ak ajiste selon sentòm/ESR
Preskri ajan ki diminye itilizasyon steroid pou moun ki souvan rekidiv
Swiv pou konplikasyon steroid (hiperglisemi, osteyopowoz, katara)
Edike sou siy avètisman GCA (doulè tèt, klodikasyon machwè, chanjman vizyon)

left: Doulè ak rèd nan zepòl ak ranch bilateral
Rèd nan maten ki dire plis pase 45 minit
Repons rapid dramatik a prednisone nan dòz ba
right: Difikilte vizyèl oswa pèt vizyon souden (djanm GCA)

medications.name: Prednisone
medications.action: Sispann enfeksyon IL-6 ki fèt nan estrikti periartikilè
medications.sideEffects: Hiperglisemi, osteyopowoz, pran pwa, sipresyon adrenal
medications.contra: Enfeksyon ki pa kontwole, istwa sikoz (relatif)
medications.pearl: Repons dramatik a 15-20mg/jou nan 24-72 èdtan se prèske dyagnostik; mank de repons ta dwe fè ou reconsidere dyagnostik la.

quiz.question: Yon NP kòmanse prednisone 15mg pou yon pasyan ki sispèk PMR. Apre 3 jou, pa gen okenn amelyorasyon. Ki sa ki ta dwe reconsidere?
quiz.rationale: PMR karakteristikman montre yon amelyorasyon dramatik nan 24-72 èdtan apre prednisone nan dòz ba. Echèk pou reponn ta dwe fè ou reconsidere dyagnostik la (panse a myozit, malignans, oswa RA).

scleroderma-systemic-sclerosis-np.title: Scleroderma/Systemic Sclerosis (NP)
scleroderma-systemic-sclerosis-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Scleroderma/Systemic Sclerosis (NP), ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Desant Afriken Ameriken (maladi ki pi grav)
Eksposisyon a silika oswa solvan òganik
clinicalPearls: Syndròm CREST (SSc limite): Kalinosis, Raynaud, Dysmotilite esofaj, Sclerodactyly, Telangiectasia
Kriz renal scleroderma: DWE itilize ACEi (captopril); ARBs pa ekivalan e yo pa ta dwe ranplase
PFT anyèl ak DLCO esansyèl pou deteksyon bonè ILD anvan sentòm devlope
scleroderma-systemic-sclerosis-np.pathophysiology: Sklérodermi sistèmik enplike twa pwosesis patolojik: vasculopathy (domaj endotelyal ki lakòz Raynaud ak iskemik dijital), aktivasyon iminitè (otoantibodi ak enfiltasyon T-selil), ak fibwos (depozisyon kolagen an ekzès nan po, poumon, kè, ak sistèm dijestif). Pwosesis fibwotik la ranplase achitekti tisi nòmal ak kolagen dans, ki afekte fonksyon ògàn yo.
diagnostics: Kòmande ANA ak antikò espesifik pou scleroderma (anti-Scl-70, anti-centromere)
Kòmande tès fonksyon poumon (DLCO pou deteksyon bonè ILD)
Kòmande echokardiogram pou depistaj ipertansyon poumon
Kòmande CT poumon ak rezolisyon wo pou maladi entèstisyèl poumon
Kòmande kateterizasyon kè dwat si yo sispèk PH
Kòmande kapilaroskopi nailfold
Kòmande etid motilite esofaj si dyspagie
management: Preskri blokè chanèl kalsyòm pou fenomèn Raynaud
Kòmande PDE5 inhibitors pou iskemik dijital grav
Preskri imunosupresyon pou ILD pwogresif (mycophenolate oswa nintedanib)
Kòmande terapi espesifik PAH si ipertansyon poumon konfime
Preskri PPI pou GERD/dysmotilite esofaj
Rele pou transplantasyon selil souch otolog pou maladi difiz rapidman pwogresif
Kòmande depistaj anyèl: PFTs, echokardiogram, ak anti-RNA polymerase III (kriz renal)
nursingActions: Dyagnostike ak klase scleroderma sistèmik (limite vs difiz)
Kòmande depistaj ògàn espesifik selon direktiv yo
Preskri terapi ki vize ògàn yo
Siveye pou kriz renal scleroderma (ipertansyon souden ak AKI)
Preskri ACEi imedyatman pou kriz renal (sèl terapi pwouve)
Kowòdone swen miltidisiplinè
Siveye pou enplikasyon kadyak (fibwos myokad, maladi konduksyon)

right: Kriz renal scleroderma (ipertansyon souden, AKI, anemi hemolitik)
Ulser dijital ki pwogrese pou gangrèn

medications.name: Mycophenolate Mofetil
medications.action: Inhibe pwopagasyon limfosit pou ralanti maladi entèstisyèl poumon pwogresif
medications.pearl: Premye liy pou scleroderma-ILD selon esè SLS-II; ranplase siklofosfamid akòz pi bon tolérance.

medications.name: Captopril
medications.action: Bloke aktivasyon RAAS nan kriz renal scleroderma
medications.pearl: Inhibiteur ACE yo se sove lavi nan kriz renal scleroderma; pa itilize ARBs (pa pwouve). Kòmanse menm si dyaliz nesesè.

quiz.question: Yon pasyan ki gen scleroderma difiz devlope ipertansyon grav souden ak kreyatinin ki ap monte. Ki sa klinisyen an ta dwe preskri imedyatman?
quiz.rationale: Kriz renal scleroderma mande inhibiteur ACE (captopril se pwototip la). ARBs pa te pwouve efikas e yo pa ta dwe ranplase.

marfan-syndrome-np.title: Syndrome de Marfan – IPA
marfan-syndrome-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Syndrome de Marfan – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Planifikasyon gwosès nan fanm ki afekte
Patisipasyon nan egzèsis konpetitif oswa isometrik
clinicalPearls: Seuil chirijikal: ≥5.0 cm jeneral, ≥4.5 cm ak istwa fanmi diseksyon oswa kwasans rapid >0.5 cm/an
Risk gwosès: rasin aortik >4.0 cm = gwo risk pou diseksyon; mande desizyon pataje
Ectopia lentis se UP nan Marfan (DOWN nan homocystinuria) - klasik pearl pou egzamen
marfan-syndrome-np.pathophysiology: Sendwòm Marfan soti nan mutasyon nan jèn FBN1 ki kode fibrillin-1, yon glikoprotéin esansyèl pou entegrite fib elastik. Fibrillin ki defo mennen nan siyalizasyon TGF-beta ki pa regle, sa ki lakòz dilatasyon pwogresif nan rasin aortik, pwolaps valv mitral, ak risk diseksyon aortik. Klinik la dwe jere siveyans kadyovaskilè pou tout lavi epi detèmine moman pou operasyon pwolaktik.
diagnostics: Kòmande echokardiogram ak mezi rasin aortik chak ane
Kòmande CT oswa MR angiografi aortik pou evalyasyon konplè aortik
Kòmande tès jenetik ak depistaj fanmi
Kòmande egzamen ophtalmolojik (lamp slit pou ectopia lentis)
Kòmande evalyasyon kritè Ghent revize
Kòmande tès estrès egzèsis anvan otorizasyon aktivite
management: Preskri beta-blocker kòm premye liy (atenolol oswa metoprolol)
Preskri losartan kòm adjonkt oswa altènatif selon etid COMPARE
Refer pou ranplasman rasin aortik pwolaktik nan ≥5.0 cm (≥4.5 cm ak faktè risk)
Preskri restriksyon egzèsis (pa gen isometrik, espò kontak, oswa atletik konpetitif)
Kòmande konsèy prekonsepsyon ak echokardiogram pou fanm ki planifye ansent
Depiste ak evalye tout fanmi premye degre
nursingActions: Preskri ak optimize terapi pwoteksyon kadyovaskilè
Detèmine moman referans chirijikal selon dimansyon aortik ak to kwasans
Kowòdone konsèy jenetik ak depistaj fanmi
Kòmande ak entèprete imaj aortik seri
Bay konsèy prekonsepsyon (diskite sou risk transmisyon 50%)
Preskri paramèt egzèsis ki an sekirite
Jere gwosès (C-seksyon si rasin >4.0 cm)

left: Pwolaps valv mitral ak ti regurgitasyon
Siy pozitif pou ponyèt ak dwèt
right: Diseksyon aortik akut (douleur dechire, asimetrik BP)

medications.name: Atenolol
medications.action: Redwi estrès sou mi aortik pa diminye to batman kè, presyon sang, ak dP/dt (to ogmantasyon presyon)
medications.pearl: Titrate pou HR repo 60-70 bpm; terapi pou tout lavi pou ralanti dilatasyon rasin aortik.

medications.name: Losartan
medications.action: Bloke siyalizasyon TGF-beta anplis bloke reseptè angiotensin II
medications.pearl: Etid COMPARE montre benefis adisyonèl lè ajoute nan beta-blocker pou diminye to kwasans aortik.

quiz.question: Yon NP evalye yon pasyan Marfan ak rasin aortik 5.2 cm, estab pandan 6 mwa, sou terapi medikal optimal. Ki pwochen etap la?
options: Refer pou ranplasman rasin aortik pwolaktik
Ajoute losartan ak recheck nan 1 ane
quiz.rationale: Rasin aortik ≥5.0 cm nan sendwòm Marfan satisfè se seuil pou ranplasman chirijikal pwolaktik kèlkeswa estabilite.

intra-aortic-balloon-pump-np.title: Ballon intra-aortique – IPA
intra-aortic-balloon-pump-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Ballon intra-aortique – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Konplikasyon mekanik MI (VSD, rupture misk papilè)
Pon pou operasyon kadyak oswa transplantasyon
Sendwòm pwodiksyon kadyak ki ba apre kadyotomi
clinicalPearls: IABP gonfle nan DYASTOLE (perfusion koronè) ak degonfle anvan SYSTOLE (diminye apre chaj)
Kontrendike nan rejè aortik (gonfle aggrave rejè a) ak diseksyon aortik
Suiv pulsasyon, koulè, tanperati, ak sansasyon nan manm ki katetè chak èdtan - iskemi manm se konplikasyon ki pi komen
intra-aortic-balloon-pump-np.pathophysiology: IABP a itilize kontrepulsasyon pou ogmante perfusion koronè ak diminye chaj travay ventrikil gòch la. Balon an gonfle pandan dyastòl (ogmante ogmantasyon dyastolik ak presyon perfusion koronè) epi li degonfle jis anvan sistòl (diminye apre chaj la pa kreye yon efè vakyòm ki fasilite ejeksyon ventrikilè). Sa a ogmante rezèv oksijèn miokad la pandan li diminye demann lan.
diagnostics: Kòmande X-ray pou verifye pozisyon tip balon an (2-3 cm distale nan subclavian gòch la)
Suiv ond arterial la pou bon tan
Kòmande siveyans hemodinamik (CO, PAWP, MAP)
Suiv pulsasyon periferik nan janm ki katetè
Kòmande CBC chak jou ak etid koagulasyon
Suiv pwodiksyon pipi chak èdtan
management: Kòmande enstalasyon IABP pou endikasyon ki apwopriye
Preskri rapò ogmantasyon 1:1 inisyalman
Kòmande optimizasyon tan (gonfle nan notch dikrotik, degonfle anvan sistòl)
Preskri antikoagilasyon (infizyon heparin)
Kòmande pwotokòl separe (diminye rapò 1:1 → 1:2 → 1:3)
Preskri retire lè li hemodinamikman estab san vasopresè
nursingActions: Kòmande plasman IABP ak verifye pozisyon
Preskri ajisteman tan ki baze sou analiz ond la
Idantifye erè bonè ak reta nan gonfle/degonfle
Kòmande pwotokòl separe pwogresif
Suiv pou konplikasyon (iskemi manm, blesi aortik, trombositopèni)
Preskri terapi antikoagilasyon
Detèmine pare pou retire ki baze sou estabilite hemodinamik

left: Ogmantasyon apwopriye: pik ogmantasyon dyastolik pi wo pase pik sistolik ki te pase
right: Gonfle reta: ogmantasyon parèt apre notch dikrotik (perfusion koronè suboptimal)
Degonfle bonè: tonbe rapid anvan sistòl (pèdi rediksyon apre chaj)
Iskemi manm (pulsasyon ki absan, doulè, palè nan janm ki katetè)
Rupture balon (san nan tib, pèdi ogmantasyon)

medications.name: Heparin Infusion
medications.action: Anpeche fòmasyon trombòs sou katetè balon an
medications.contra: Sanglòt aktif ki pa kontwole, trombositopèni grav
medications.pearl: Manten an aPTT 50-70 segonn; swiv plaquettes chak jou pou HIT; kenbe pou sanglòt aktif.

quiz.question: Yon NP revize yon ond IABP epi li remake pik ogmantasyon an parèt byen apre notch dikrotik la. Ki erè tan ki prezan?
quiz.rationale: Gonfle reta vle di balon an gonfle apre notch dikrotik la, diminye efikasite ogmantasyon dyastolik ak perfusion koronè.

quiz.question: Ki kondisyon ki se yon kontrendikasyon absoli pou plasman IABP?
quiz.rationale: IABP se kontrendike nan rejè aortik paske gonfle balon an pandan dyastòl ta aggrave kou rejè a tounen nan ventrikil gòch la.

pacemaker-care.title: Pacemakers: Insertion, Types, and Nursing Care
pacemaker-care.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Pacemakers: Insertion, Types, and Nursing Care, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Symptomatic bradycardia (sick sinus syndrome, heart block)
Advanced AV block (second-degree Type II, third-degree)
clinicalPearls: Post-insertion: Immobilize the arm on the pacemaker side for 24-48 hours (prevents lead displacement). No lifting >10 lbs on the affected side for 4-6 weeks.
Monitor ECG continuously post-insertion: verify capture (spike + complex), sensing (appropriate inhibition), and correct rate. Report failure to capture or failure to sense immediately.

Pacemaker syndrome occurs when AV synchrony is lost (ventricular pacing without atrial contribution: loss of 'atrial kick' reduces cardiac output by 15-25%). Symptoms: fatigue, dizziness, hypotension, pulsatile sensation in neck (cannon A waves from atria contracting against closed AV valves).

Electromagnetic interference (EMI): MRI is now conditionally safe with MRI-conditional pacemakers (must verify model). Avoid holding cell phone directly over the generator. Electrocautery during surgery can inhibit pacing: have magnet available. Metal detectors at airports are safe but may trigger the alarm.

Teach patient to check pulse daily and report a rate below the programmed base rate. Carry pacemaker ID card at all times. Follow up for interrogation every 6-12 months to check battery, lead impedance, and sensing/capture thresholds.

Transcutaneous pacing (external): Place pads anterior-posterior. Set rate 60-80 bpm, increase milliamps until electrical and mechanical capture (palpable pulse). This is PAINFUL: sedate the conscious patient.

hypertensive-emergency-np.title: Urgence hypertensive – IPA
hypertensive-emergency-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Urgence hypertensive – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Medication non-adherence - most common precipitant of hypertensive emergency
Chronic kidney disease - impaired sodium excretion and RAAS dysregulation
Renovascular disease - renal artery stenosis driving excessive renin secretion
Sympathomimetic drug use (cocaine, amphetamines) - direct catecholamine excess
Abrupt clonidine withdrawal - rebound sympathetic hyperactivity
clinicalPearls: Never use sublingual nifedipine - causes unpredictable precipitous BP drops leading to stroke and MI
In aortic dissection, beta-blocker BEFORE vasodilator to prevent reflex tachycardia that increases aortic shear stress
Hypertensive urgency (elevated BP without end-organ damage) does NOT require IV therapy - restart/adjust oral medications and follow up in 24-72 hours

vte-prophylaxis-np.title: Prophylaxie de la TEV – IPA
vte-prophylaxis-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Prophylaxie de la TEV – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Major orthopedic surgery (hip/knee replacement) - highest risk category, VTE rate 40-60% without prophylaxis
Active malignancy - tumor cells express tissue factor and cancer procoagulant (direct Factor X activator)
Prior VTE - recurrence rate 30% within 10 years
Prolonged immobilization >72 hours - venous stasis in soleal sinuses and valve pockets
Obesity (BMI >30) - chronic low-grade inflammation and impaired fibrinolysis
Inherited thrombophilias (Factor V Leiden, prothrombin G20210A mutation) - resistance to activated Protein C or excess prothrombin
Estrogen therapy/pregnancy - upregulates hepatic synthesis of Factors II, VII, VIII, X and fibrinogen
clinicalPearls: Caprini score ≥5 = high risk: pharmacological prophylaxis is mandatory unless contraindicated. Each additional point increases VTE risk exponentially.
LMWH is renally cleared - always check CrCl before prescribing. CrCl <30 mL/min: switch to UFH 5000 units SQ every 8-12 hours.

HIT is a clinical diagnosis confirmed by the 4T score: Thrombocytopenia (>50% drop), Timing (5-14 days), Thrombosis, and no oTher cause. Stop all heparin products immediately and start argatroban or bivalirudin.

brugada-syndrome-np.title: Syndrome de Brugada – IPA
brugada-syndrome-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Syndrome de Brugada – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: SCN5A mutation carriers (autosomal dominant with variable penetrance, 20-30% of cases)
Male sex - 8:1 male predominance due to higher testosterone-mediated Ito density in male epicardium
Southeast Asian descent - highest prevalence (1 in 1000 in Thailand, leading cause of sudden death in young men)
Family history of sudden cardiac death before age 45
Febrile illness - fever augments sodium channel dysfunction and can unmask Type 1 ECG pattern
Medications that block sodium channels (Class IA/IC antiarrhythmics, tricyclic antidepressants, lithium, cocaine)
Vagal predominance - symptoms occur at rest or during sleep when vagal tone is highest
clinicalPearls: Brugada Type 1 ECG can be unmasked by fever, sodium channel blockers, vagotonic states, and hypokalemia - always check ECG during febrile illness in known carriers
ICD is the ONLY proven therapy to prevent sudden cardiac death in Brugada - no antiarrhythmic drug has shown mortality benefit in RCTs
Brugada ECG mimickers: right bundle branch block, early repolarization, anterior STEMI - always correlate with clinical context and consider V1-V3 lead repositioning

long-qt-syndrome-np.title: Syndrome du QT long – IPA
long-qt-syndrome-np.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Syndrome du QT long – IPA, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Congenital LQTS gene mutations - LQT1 (KCNQ1, 40-55%), LQT2 (KCNH2/hERG, 30-45%), LQT3 (SCN5A, 5-10%)

QTc-prolonging medications - antiarrhythmics (sotalol, dofetilide, amiodarone), antibiotics (fluoroquinolones, azithromycin, TMP-SMX), antipsychotics (haloperidol, ziprasidone), antiemetics (ondansetron, droperidol)
Hypokalemia - reduces IKr current by altering channel rectification properties
Hypomagnesemia - impairs repolarizing K+ channel function and enhances L-type Ca2+ current
Female sex - 2:1 female predominance for drug-induced LQTS due to lower baseline IKr density (estrogen effect)
Bradycardia - slower heart rates prolong repolarization and increase EAD susceptibility (pause-dependent TdP)
Structural heart disease with reduced ejection fraction - heterogeneous repolarization substrate
clinicalPearls: QTc >500 ms is the critical threshold - risk of TdP increases exponentially. Discontinue offending drugs, correct electrolytes, and consider overdrive pacing.
Torsades treatment is NOT the same as monomorphic VT: do NOT give amiodarone or procainamide (both prolong QT further). First-line: IV magnesium. Second-line: overdrive pacing or isoproterenol.
Genotype-trigger correlations: LQT1 = exercise (especially swimming), LQT2 = auditory stimuli (alarm clocks, phones), LQT3 = sleep/rest. Counsel patients on genotype-specific avoidance strategies.

tetralogy-of-fallot.title: Tétralogie de Fallot
tetralogy-of-fallot.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Tétralogie de Fallot, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Enfeksyon rubella maternel nan premye trimès
Istwa fanmi de maladi kè konjenital
Ekspozisyon fetalis a phenytoin, asid retinoik, oswa lòt teratogen
clinicalPearls: Pozisyon jenou-poze se premye aksyon enfimyè a pandan yon kriz Tet - li ogmante rezistans vaskilè sistemik, ki redui shunt soti nan dwat pou ale nan goch ak fòse san atravè valv poumon an
Chita nan timoun ki pi gran, ki pa repare se ekivalan yo te aprann tèt yo nan pozisyon jenou-poze - timoun yo natirèlman pran pozisyon sa a pou soulaje koulè ble
Kè fòm bòt sou CXR se klasik: konkavite nan segman atè poumon an ak apèks ki vire anlè soti nan hypertrofi RV
Pa administre digoxin pandan kriz Tet - ogmantasyon kontraktilite a vin pi mal obstriksyon infundibulè a
tetralogy-of-fallot.pathophysiology: Tetralogy of Fallot (TOF) se defo kè konjenital ki pi komen ki bay koulè ble, ki fèt akòz devyasyon anterè ak tèt nan septòm infundibulè a pandan devlopman anbrayonik. Erè devlopman sa a pwodui kat defo anatomi: (1) Stenoz poumon - restriksyon nan kou dlo san ki soti nan ventrikul dwat la (RVOT) ki limite koule san nan poumon yo, sa ki diminye oksijèn. Degre stenoz la detèmine gravite klinik la. (2) Defo septal ventrikilè (VSD) - yon gwo defo ki pa restriktif ki pèmèt kominikasyon ant ventrik yo. (3) Aorta ki depase - rasin aorta a deplase sou bò dwat, ki kouvri VSD a epi ki resevwa san nan tou de ventrik. (4) Hypertrofi ventrikil dwat - devlope kòm yon repons pandan ventrikil dwat la ap travay kont obstriksyon poumon an. Hemodinamykman, stenoz poumon ogmante presyon sou bò dwat la, sa ki fè san ki pa oksijene a pase soti nan dwat pou ale nan goch atravè VSD a nan aorta ki depase a ak sikilasyon sistemik. Sa a lakòz desatirasyon sistemik ak koulè ble. Pandan kriz hypercyanotic ('Tet'), spasme infundibulè a vin pi mal rapidman, sa ki ogmante dramatikman shunt soti nan dwat pou ale nan goch la epi ki lakòz koulè ble pwofon, ipoksik, ak asidòz metabolik. San entèvansyon, kriz grav ka mennen nan kriz, avc, oswa lanmò.
diagnostics: Atann echokardiogram pou konfime kat defo anatomi (standa lò)
Kontwole oksimetrik pous kontinyèlman (saturasyon bazik tipikman 75-85%)
Atann X-ray nan pwatrin ki montre 'kè fòm bòt' (coeur en sabot) soti nan hypertrofi RV
Atann ECG ki montre devyasyon aks dwat ak hypertrofi ventrikil dwat
Kontwole hemoglobin ak hematokrit (polycythemia konpansatwa devlope)
Atann katetè kadyak pre-opere pou defini anatomi
Kontwole gaz san atè pandan kriz Tet
management: Mete tibebe a nan pozisyon jenou-poze pandan kriz hypercyanotic (Tet)
Administre oksijèn jan yo te preskri pandan kriz Tet (siplemantè, pa geri)
Administre morfin jan yo te preskri pou redui spasme infundibulè pandan kriz yo
Administre IV phenylephrine jan yo te preskri pou ogmante SVR pandan kriz grav
Bay ti manje souvan, ki gen anpil kalori ak peryòd repo
Klasifye swen enfimyè pou minimize konsomasyon oksijèn
Prepare fanmi an pou reparasyon chirijikal (reparasyon intracadyak konplè tipikman nan 3-6 mwa)
Manten aksè IV jan yo te preskri
nursingActions: Kontwole pou kriz hypercyanotic (Tet): koulè ble ki parèt rapid, iritabilite, kri ki pa ka konsole, hyperpnea
Pozisyone tibebe a nan pozisyon jenou-poze imedyatman pandan kriz Tet la epi notifye founisè a
Kontwole tandans saturasyon oksijèn ak rapòte bazik ki ap diminye
Evalye tolerans alimantasyon (diaphoresis, tachypnea, fatig pandan manje ki endike estrès kadyak)
Kontwole pou siy konplikasyon polycythemia (thrombosis, avc)
Manten idratasyon adekwa pou evite hemoconcentration ak sickling san polycythemic
Edike paran yo sou rekonesans kriz Tet nan kay ak pozisyon jenou-poze
Kontwole konplikasyon apre operasyon: senyen, aritmi, VSD reziduel, regurgitasyon poumon

left: Koulè ble (vin pi mal ak kri/manje)
Konpòtman chita nan timoun ki pi gran
right: Iritabilite ak kri ki pa ka konsole

medications.name: Morphine Sulfate
medications.action: Relaxe spasme infundibulè a epi redui retou venoz sistemik pandan kriz Tet yo
medications.pearl: Bay IV pandan kriz Tet akut yo pou kase sik spasme infundibulè a. Kontwole estati respiratwa a ak anpil atansyon.

medications.name: Propranolol
medications.action: Redwi spasme infundibulè ak to kè, estabilize dinamik RVOT
medications.pearl: Itilize pwofilaktikman pou anpeche kriz Tet pandan ap tann reparasyon chirijikal. Kontwole glikoz san nan nouvo fèt yo.

medications.name: Prostaglandin E1 (Alprostadil)
medications.action: Manten patansite ductus arteriosus pou pèmèt koule san poumon nan ka grav
medications.contra: Pa gen okenn absoli nan sitiyasyon ijans
medications.pearl: Itilize nan nouvo fèt ki gen stenoz poumon grav ki depann sou ductus pou koule san poumon. Kenbe ekipman entubasyon nan bò kabann.

quiz.question: Yon tibebe 4 mwa ki gen Tetralogy of Fallot ki konnen a vin koulè ble pwofon, iritabil, epi li ap respire rapidman. Ki sa ki premye aksyon enfimyè a?
options: Mete tibebe a nan pozisyon jenou-poze
Administre IV morfin jan yo te preskri
quiz.rationale: Pozisyon jenou-poze se premye aksyon imedya pandan yon kriz Tet. Li ogmante rezistans vaskilè sistemik (SVR) pa konprese atè femoral yo, sa ki redui shunt soti nan dwat pou ale nan goch atravè VSD a epi ki redireksyon plis san atravè valv poumon stenotik la pou ale nan poumon yo. Oksijèn, morfin, ak lòt entèvansyon swiv men pozisyon an vini an premye.

who-see-first-adult.title: Who Do You See First: Adult Medical-Surgical
who-see-first-adult.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Who Do You See First: Adult Medical-Surgical, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: New-onset vital sign changes (tachycardia, hypotension, tachypnea, fever, desaturation)
Altered level of consciousness or new confusion
Acute chest pain, dyspnea, or hemodynamic instability
Patients returning from procedures requiring immediate assessment
Fall risk patients reporting dizziness or near-falls
Patients with new lab critical values requiring action
Diabetic patients with blood glucose extremes (<70 or >400 mg/dL)
clinicalPearls: The word 'NEW' is the most important word in prioritization  -  new symptoms always take priority over chronic stable conditions
Acute changes > Chronic conditions. Unexpected findings > Expected findings. Physiological needs > Psychosocial needs
Never choose an answer that delays assessment of an acutely ill patient for a task that can wait or be delegated
On exams, if a patient is 'pale, diaphoretic, and anxious,' this is describing hemodynamic instability  -  see this patient FIRST
A patient who 'doesn't look right' to an experienced nurse often IS deteriorating  -  trust clinical judgment and assess immediately
Post-surgical patients with sudden onset symptoms (pain, dyspnea, bleeding) are ALWAYS a priority over stable patients

who-see-first-pediatric.title: Who Do You See First: Pediatric Scenarios
who-see-first-pediatric.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Who Do You See First: Pediatric Scenarios, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Neonates and infants (<12 months)  -  highest vulnerability due to immature immune and physiological systems
Premature infants  -  increased risk of apnea, respiratory failure, and sepsis
Children with congenital heart defects  -  at risk for heart failure, cyanotic spells, and arrhythmias
Immunocompromised children (chemotherapy, transplant)  -  fever may be the only sign of life-threatening infection
Children with recent surgical procedures  -  higher risk of airway and respiratory complications
Toddlers and preschoolers  -  high risk for foreign body aspiration and accidental poisoning
Adolescents  -  risk of self-harm, substance use, and eating disorders presenting as medical complaints
clinicalPearls: In pediatrics, respiratory failure is the #1 cause of cardiac arrest  -  NOT a cardiac event. A child in respiratory distress is ALWAYS your priority
Tachycardia is the FIRST sign of shock in children. Hypotension is a LATE sign indicating decompensated shock and imminent arrest
A quiet, lethargic child who was previously active is MORE concerning than a screaming, crying child  -  crying requires energy and an intact airway
Never examine the throat of a child with suspected epiglottitis  -  this can cause complete airway obstruction. Keep the child calm, in a position of comfort (usually sitting upright on parent's lap)
Fever in a neonate (<28 days) is ALWAYS an emergency  -  assume sepsis until proven otherwise, even if the baby 'looks fine'
Trust parental intuition: 'My child isn't acting right' is a clinically significant finding that warrants thorough assessment

delegation-traps-exam.title: Delegation Traps: Common Exam Pitfalls
delegation-traps-exam.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Delegation Traps: Common Exam Pitfalls, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Failure to understand scope of practice boundaries (RN vs LPN vs UAP)
Delegating assessment, evaluation, or nursing judgment to non-licensed personnel
Delegating tasks for unstable or unpredictable patients to UAP
Insufficient communication when delegating (vague instructions, no parameters for reporting)
Failing to supervise or follow up on delegated tasks
Assuming competency without verification (float pool staff, new hires, agency nurses)
Over-delegating: assigning too many tasks to one person, compromising safety
Under-delegating: performing all tasks yourself instead of appropriately using team members
clinicalPearls: UAP can COLLECT data (vital signs, I&O) but cannot INTERPRET or ASSESS data. The distinction is critical for exam questions
The most experienced UAP still cannot perform tasks outside UAP scope  -  experience does not expand legal scope of practice
When in doubt on an exam, choose the answer that keeps assessment, evaluation, and nursing judgment with the RN
Delegation is a TWO-WAY accountability: the RN is accountable for the delegation decision; the delegate is accountable for performing the task correctly
'Stable and predictable' are the key words for delegation eligibility  -  if either word doesn't apply, the RN should perform the task
On exams, watch for the answer that says 'do it yourself' when delegation IS appropriate  -  appropriate delegation is part of effective nursing practice

unexpected-vs-expected.title: Unexpected vs Expected Findings: Clinical Red Flags
unexpected-vs-expected.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Unexpected vs Expected Findings: Clinical Red Flags, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Failure to establish baseline assessment data for comparison
Insufficient knowledge of expected post-procedure recovery timelines
Normalizing abnormal findings in patients with chronic conditions
Anchoring bias: focusing on the initial assessment and missing subsequent changes
Handoff communication gaps: not receiving complete information about the patient's trajectory
Alarm fatigue: desensitization to monitor alarms leading to delayed response
Cognitive overload: managing too many patients simultaneously, missing subtle changes
clinicalPearls: On exams, 'Which finding requires the nurse to notify the provider?' = the UNEXPECTED finding that deviates from normal recovery
The timeline matters: low-grade fever on post-op day 1 is expected (Wind/atelectasis). Fever on day 5-7 is unexpected (Wound infection, DVT)
Any SUDDEN onset of symptoms (pain, dyspnea, confusion, bleeding) is almost always unexpected and requires immediate action
Trust the data: compare current assessment to baseline. If something changed, investigate  -  even if the patient 'looks fine'
Expected does NOT mean unimportant  -  expected findings still require documentation, monitoring, and appropriate nursing interventions
When an exam gives you four findings and asks which one to report, three will be expected and one will be the clinical red flag

acute-deterioration-recognition.title: Acute Deterioration Recognition & Rapid Response
acute-deterioration-recognition.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Acute Deterioration Recognition & Rapid Response, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Admission from emergency department with acute illness
Chronic comorbidities (COPD, heart failure, renal disease, diabetes, immunosuppression)
Advanced age with limited physiological reserve
Recent discharge from ICU (within 48 hours)  -  highest risk of re-deterioration
History of previous cardiac arrest or ICU admission during this hospitalization
Sepsis or suspected infection with systemic inflammatory response
Patients receiving opioids or sedatives  -  risk of respiratory depression
clinicalPearls: 60-80% of in-hospital cardiac arrests are preceded by identifiable warning signs 6-24 hours before the event
Tachycardia is often the EARLIEST sign of deterioration  -  a rising heart rate trend is more important than any single reading
You do NOT need to diagnose the problem to activate the Rapid Response Team. 'I'm concerned about my patient' is sufficient
Respiratory rate is the most frequently abnormal vital sign before cardiac arrest and the most commonly missed or inaccurately recorded vital sign
Never reassure yourself by a normal blood pressure alone  -  patients compensate until they can't, and then they crash rapidly
If something feels wrong, ACT. The cost of a false alarm is infinitely less than the cost of failing to rescue

medication-safety-prioritization.title: Medication Safety: Prioritization & Error Prevention
medication-safety-prioritization.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Medication Safety: Prioritization & Error Prevention, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Polypharmacy (5+ medications)  -  increases risk of drug interactions and errors
High-alert medications: insulin, anticoagulants, opioids, concentrated electrolytes
Pediatric and geriatric patients  -  weight-based dosing errors, altered pharmacokinetics
Renal or hepatic impairment  -  requires dose adjustments that may be overlooked
Transitions of care (admission, transfer, discharge)  -  medication reconciliation gaps
Verbal or telephone orders  -  high risk of miscommunication
Interruptions during medication preparation and administration
clinicalPearls: The #1 rule of medication safety: If something doesn't seem right, STOP and CLARIFY before administering
NEVER document medication administration before giving the medication  -  always document AFTER
Independent double-checks for high-alert medications mean two nurses INDEPENDENTLY verify  -  not just co-signing
If a patient says 'That doesn't look like my usual pill'  -  STOP and verify. Patients often know their medications better than we expect
Medication errors are SYSTEM failures, not individual failures. Report all errors to improve the system. A culture of punishment leads to underreporting
The most dangerous medication errors involve the 'wrong dose' of the 'right drug'  -  always double-check dosing calculations

postop-complication-recognition.title: Post-Operative Complication Recognition
postop-complication-recognition.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Post-Operative Complication Recognition, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Prolonged surgical time (>3 hours increases all complication risks)
Abdominal or thoracic surgery (highest risk for respiratory complications)
Obesity (BMI >30): increased risk of wound complications, DVT, and respiratory issues
Diabetes mellitus: delayed healing, increased infection risk, glucose instability
Current smoking: impaired wound healing, bronchospasm, atelectasis
Immunosuppression (steroids, chemotherapy, HIV): increased infection susceptibility
clinicalPearls: Post-op fever mnemonic: Wind (Day 1-2), Water (Day 3-5), Wound (Day 5-7), Walking (Day 5-7), Wonder drugs (anytime)
Atelectasis is the #1 most common post-op complication  -  prevention with incentive spirometry and early ambulation is essential
If evisceration occurs: NEVER push organs back in. Cover with sterile saline-moistened gauze, position supine with knees bent, NPO, call surgeon STAT
The 6 P's of neurovascular compromise: Pain (out of proportion), Pallor, Pulselessness, Paresthesia, Paralysis, Poikilothermia (cool extremity)
Sudden dyspnea + chest pain + tachycardia on post-op day 5-7 = PE until proven otherwise
Malignant hyperthermia is a genetic condition  -  always ask about family history of anesthesia complications

pediatric-vs-adult-priorities.title: Pediatric vs Adult Prioritization Differences
pediatric-vs-adult-priorities.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Pediatric vs Adult Prioritization Differences, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Failure to use age-appropriate vital sign ranges (applying adult parameters to children)
Underestimating the significance of tachycardia in pediatric patients
Assuming hypotension is required for shock diagnosis in children
Using adult medication doses without weight-based calculations
Missing subtle behavioral cues in pre-verbal children (lethargy, poor feeding, decreased play)
Delayed recognition of respiratory failure as a precursor to cardiac arrest
Inadequate fluid resuscitation (not using weight-based bolus calculations)
clinicalPearls: Children are NOT small adults  -  their physiology, pharmacology, and clinical presentations are fundamentally different
In adults, cardiac arrest is usually cardiac in origin. In children, it's almost always respiratory  -  AIRWAY and BREATHING are paramount
Tachycardia = first sign of shock in children. Hypotension = LATE sign meaning decompensation has occurred
A quiet, lethargic child is MORE concerning than a screaming child  -  crying requires energy and an intact cardiorespiratory system
1 mm of airway edema reduces a pediatric airway by 44% vs 19% in adults  -  small changes have huge impact
Parental report of 'something is different about my child' is a clinically significant finding that warrants immediate assessment

first-action-logic.title: First Action Logic: What to Do Before Calling the Provider
first-action-logic.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl First Action Logic: What to Do Before Calling the Provider, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Calling the provider without completing an assessment first (unprepared communication)
Delaying independent nursing actions while waiting for provider callback
Failing to act within nursing scope during emergencies (e.g., waiting for an order to apply O2)
Not knowing which actions require orders vs which are independent nursing interventions
Over-reliance on provider direction for routine nursing decisions
Incomplete data collection before provider notification (missing vital signs, assessment findings)
Calling at inappropriate times or through wrong channels (non-urgent pages for non-urgent findings)
clinicalPearls: On exams, 'Notify the healthcare provider' is rarely the FIRST action  -  assess and intervene within scope FIRST
The exception: if the question states the nurse has already assessed and the findings require medical intervention beyond nursing scope
In emergencies, you have standing authority to: maintain airway, apply O2, initiate CPR, apply pressure to bleeding, position for safety
SBAR is the gold standard for provider communication: Situation, Background, Assessment, Recommendation
A nurse who calls a provider and says 'I don't know what's wrong but the patient looks bad' has NOT prepared adequately
Always end your SBAR with a recommendation  -  this demonstrates clinical judgment and often expedites appropriate orders

assignment-making-scenarios.title: Assignment Making: Matching Patient Acuity to Staff
assignment-making-scenarios.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Assignment Making: Matching Patient Acuity to Staff, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Float or agency nurses unfamiliar with unit-specific patient populations and protocols
New graduate nurses in orientation or early independent practice
High patient-to-nurse ratios compromising safe care delivery
Multiple admissions, discharges, and transfers (ADT) creating unpredictable workload shifts
Patients requiring specialized skills (ventilator management, CRRT, complex wound care) assigned to nurses without demonstrated competency
Inadequate staffing mix (too few RNs for the acuity of patients on the unit)
Failure to account for non-direct care responsibilities (charge duties, precepting, orientation)
clinicalPearls: Assignment making is about COMPETENCY, not just convenience. The goal is to match patient needs to staff capabilities
A float nurse should NEVER receive the most complex patients on the unit  -  they lack unit-specific knowledge and familiarity with protocols
New graduates need stable, predictable patients  -  not complex ones 'to learn from.' Learning occurs with appropriate support, not trial by fire
LPNs cannot perform initial assessments, create care plans, or administer IV push medications. Assignment must reflect these scope limitations
Continuity of care improves outcomes  -  assign the same nurse to the same patient across shifts whenever possible
When an exam question asks 'Which patient should be assigned to the float nurse?'  -  the answer is always the most STABLE patient

abcs-life-threats.title: ABCs & Immediate Life Threat Prioritization
abcs-life-threats.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl ABCs & Immediate Life Threat Prioritization, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Failure to assess airway patency before addressing other complaints
Distraction by dramatic but non-life-threatening findings (e.g., open fracture)
Treating pain before ensuring adequate oxygenation and ventilation
Addressing psychosocial concerns before stabilizing physiological parameters
Failure to recognize early signs of airway compromise (stridor, accessory muscle use)
Delayed recognition of obstructive airway emergencies (anaphylaxis, epiglottitis)
Ignoring subtle signs of circulatory compromise (delayed capillary refill, mottling)
Over-focusing on single vital sign abnormalities without assessing the full ABC picture
clinicalPearls: If the patient can speak in complete sentences, the airway is patent and breathing is sufficient for the moment
In trauma, assume cervical spine injury until cleared - use jaw thrust instead of head-tilt chin-lift
Bleeding that you can see is less dangerous than bleeding you cannot see (internal hemorrhage)
On NCLEX: when multiple patients need attention, always address the ABC problem first

unstable-vs-stable.title: Unstable vs Stable: Prioritization Framework
unstable-vs-stable.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Unstable vs Stable: Prioritization Framework, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Failure to recognize 'new onset' vs 'chronic/expected' presentation
Assuming that stable vital signs mean the patient is clinically stable
Normalizing abnormal findings because the patient 'always looks like that'
Failure to trend vital signs and recognize deteriorating patterns
Over-reliance on technology without clinical bedside assessment
Cognitive anchoring to the initial diagnosis without considering new developments
Failure to reassess after interventions to determine effectiveness
Delaying assessment of patients who 'look fine' but have concerning vital signs
clinicalPearls: The word 'NEW' is the most important word in clinical prioritization - new symptoms always take priority
A patient with 'normal' vital signs can still be unstable if those values represent a significant change from their baseline
Expected pain after surgery is stable; new-onset sharp chest pain after surgery is unstable (possible PE)
When in doubt, assess the patient at the bedside - no amount of data review replaces a hands-on evaluation

who-to-see-first.title: Who to See First: Clinical Decision Framework
who-to-see-first.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Who to See First: Clinical Decision Framework, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Seeing patients in room order rather than acuity order
Addressing the most vocal or demanding patient first instead of the most critical
Confusing urgency with importance (a patient demanding pain medication vs. a silent patient with declining SpO2)
Failure to delegate appropriate tasks to free time for high-acuity patients
Not reassessing priorities after new information becomes available
Anchoring on initial morning assessment without accounting for acute changes
Inadequate shift handoff leading to missed clinical concerns
clinicalPearls: The sickest patient is not always the loudest - a patient who is too sick to call for help is more critical than one who is yelling for pain medication
On NCLEX, when all patients seem equally urgent, apply ABCs to differentiate
Expected findings for a diagnosis are never the priority over unexpected/new findings in another patient
When delegating to UAP, you free yourself to focus on the patients who require RN-level assessment and judgment

delegation-rules-scope.title: Delegation Rules & Scope of Practice
delegation-rules-scope.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Delegation Rules & Scope of Practice, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Delegating assessment, evaluation, or clinical judgment to UAPs
Failing to verify the delegate's competency for the specific task
Delegating to an overwhelmed staff member without checking their workload
Assuming that RPN/LPN scope is identical to RN scope
Failing to provide clear, complete instructions and expected reporting parameters
Not following up after delegation to evaluate task completion and patient outcome
Delegating unstable or unpredictable patient care to inappropriate personnel
Delegating tasks that are excluded from the delegate's scope by regulation
clinicalPearls: The RN ALWAYS retains accountability for delegated tasks - you can delegate the task but never the responsibility
Assessment is NEVER delegated - UAPs collect data (vital signs), but the RN interprets and assesses
When in doubt about scope, check: Can the delegate legally do this? Do they have the competency? Is the patient stable enough?
On NCLEX, if the question involves an unstable patient, the answer is almost always 'the RN does it' - not delegated

sbar-escalation.title: SBAR Escalation: When & How to Escalate
sbar-escalation.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl SBAR Escalation: When & How to Escalate, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Hesitation to contact physicians due to intimidation or hierarchical culture
Failure to articulate clinical concern clearly and concisely
Presenting data without clinical interpretation or recommendation
Accepting a physician response that does not adequately address the concern
Failure to use the chain of command when initial escalation is inadequate
