malignant-hyperthermia.title: Malignant Hyperthermia
malignant-hyperthermia.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Malignant Hyperthermia, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Epizòd ki pa te dyagnostike anvan pandan anestezi
clinicalPearls: SISPANN ajan anestezi ki deklanche a IMEDYATMAN epi iperventile ak 100% O2
Rele pou èd - sa a mande plizyè founisè an menm tan
Dantrolene DWE estoke nenpòt kote anestezi jeneral ap administre
Tès jenetik disponib: tès kontraksyon kafe-halothane
ISTWA FANMI se kritik - eritaj autosomal dominan
Refwadi pasyan an agresivman: likid IV glas, pakèt glas nan aksil/inguinal/kou
malignant-hyperthermia.pathophysiology: Reyaksyon farmakogenetik ki menase lavi ki deklanche pa anestezi volat (halothane, sevoflurane, desflurane) oswa succinylcholine. Defo jenetik nan reseptè ryanodine (RYR1 gene) sou retikulum sarkoplasmik nan misk skeletal la lakòz yon lage kalsyòm ki pa kontwole, sa ki mennen nan kontraksyon misk ki soutni, ipermetabolizm, tanperati ki ap monte rapidman (>104°F/40°C), rhabdomyolysis, asidòz metabolik, ipèkalemi, ak lanmò si yo pa trete.
diagnostics: Suivi CO2 fen-tidal (ogmantasyon rapid EtCO2 se premye siy la)
Suivi tanperati (ogmantasyon rapid > 104°F/40°C)
Suivi ritm kè (tachycardia san eksplikasyon)
Evalyasyon urinen pou koulè fonse (myoglobinuria)
management: SISPANN ajan ki deklanche yo imedyatman
Administre dantrolene IV jan sa preskri (2.5 mg/kg, repete jan sa nesesè)
Aplike mezi refwadisman (pakèt glas, dra refwadisman, likid IV frèt)
Administre 100% oksijèn
Notify anestezist la imedyatman
nursingActions: Rekonèt siy bonè: tachycardia san eksplikasyon, ogmantasyon EtCO2, rijidite machwè
Asiste ak reconstitisyon ak administrasyon dantrolene
Aplike mezi refwadisman aktif (pakèt glas nan zòn inguinal, aksilè, kou)
Suivi pwodiksyon urinen ak koulè
Rapòte istwa fanmi MH pandan evalyasyon pre-op
Asire dantrolene disponib nenpòt kote anestezi ap administre

left: Rijidite Misk Masseter (machwè - premye siy misk la)
right: Ipèkalemi, DIC (siy ki ta ka parèt pita)

medications.name: Dantrolene Sodium
medications.action: SOUVAN sèl tretman espesifik - bloke lage kalsyòm nan retikulum sarkoplasmik
medications.pearl: Dòz: 2.5 mg/kg IV, repete jan sa nesesè. Dwe disponib KOTE anestezi ap administre. Bezwen reconstitisyon - asiyen yon moun dedye.

medications.name: Iced Normal Saline
medications.action: Redwi tanperati kò santral la
medications.pearl: Aplike pakèt glas nan aksil, inguinal, ak kou. Sodium bicarbonate pou asidòz. Enzilin + glikoz pou ipèkalemi. Tanperati sib <38.5°C.

quiz.question: Ki medikaman ki premye liy pou maladi ipermetabolik?
quiz.rationale: Dantrolene sodium se SÈLMAN tretman espesifik pou maladi ipermetabolik. Li fonksyone pa bloke lage kalsyòm anòmal ki soti nan retikulum sarkoplasmik ki mennen nan kriz ipermetabolik la. Dwe administre imedyatman nan 2.5 mg/kg IV epi repete jan sa nesesè.

anaphylaxis.title: Anaphylaxis Management
anaphylaxis.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Anaphylaxis Management, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Alèji ki konnen (manje, pike ensèk, medikaman, latex)
clinicalPearls: ABCs premye - asire airway, sipòte respirasyon ak sikilasyon
Epinephrine se SÈLMAN premye tretman - PA retade pou antihistamines
Reyaksyon biphasik posib: suiv pasyan an pou 4-6 èdtan apre rezolisyon inisyal
EpiPen ansèyman: retire kouvèti sekirite a, peze fò nan kwis ekstèn, kenbe 10 segonn
Idantifye ak evite estrikteman deklanche yo ale pi devan
Pasyan an ta dwe mete yon braslè alèt medikal ak pote EpiPen tout tan
anaphylaxis.pathophysiology: Reyaksyon grav ki medyatè pa IgE, ki se yon reyaksyon ipersensibilite Tip I. Sensibilizasyon anvan pwodui anticorps IgE ki mare ak selil mast ak basophils. Re-expozisyon an déclenche dégranulation masiv ki lage histamin, leukotrienes, ak prostaglandins. Sa a lakòz bronchospasm, vasodilatasyon sistèmik, ogmantasyon nan perméabilité vaskilè, ak kolaps kadyovaskilè nan kèk minit.
diagnostics: Evalyasyon airway (stridor, gonfle lang/bouch)
Siy vital (ipotansyon, takikardi)
Evalyasyon po (urticaria, flushing, angioedema)
Evalyasyon respiratwa (wheezing, dyspnea)
Suivi saturation oksijèn
management: Administre epinephrine IM (nan kwis lateral) selon lòd - PREMYE priyorite
Rele asistans dijans
Kenbe airway ak administre oksijèn
Pozisyon sou do ak janm leve si ipotansif
Etabli aksè IV ak administre likid selon lòd
nursingActions: Administre epinephrine IM kòm premye tretman selon lòd
Suivi airway kontinyèlman pou konpwomèt
Aplike oksijèn ak suiv SpO2
Etabli aksè IV gwo bore
Suivi pou reyaksyon biphasik (rekirans 4-12 èdtan pita)
Dokimante alèji ak reyaksyon nan dosye ak braslè alèji

medications.name: Epinephrine IM
medications.action: Reverses bronchospasm, vasoconstriction, reduces vascular permeability
medications.contra: PA gen okenn nan anafilaksi (sove lavi)
medications.pearl: PREMYE ak PIYORITE dwòg. Bay IM nan vastus lateralis (kwis lateral). Ka repete chak 5-15 minit. PA retade pou lòt medikaman.

medications.name: Diphenhydramine + Ranitidine
medications.action: Bloke reseptè histamin pou redui repons alèjik
medications.pearl: Tretman adjonkt apre epinephrine. Albuterol nebulizer pou bronchospasm ki pèsiste. IV likid (1-2L NS bolus) pou ipotansyon.

quiz.question: Ki wout ak sit ki kòrèk pou administre epinephrine nan anafilaksi?
quiz.rationale: Epinephrine bay intramuscularly (IM) nan vastus lateralis (kwis ekstèn) pou anafilaksi. Kwis la gen yon bon ekipman san pou absòpsyon rapid. IM se pi bon pase subcutaneous (absòpsyon pi rapid) ak IV (rezève pou ka refraktè nan anviwònman ki kontwole).

siadh-di.title: SIADH et diabète insipide
siadh-di.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl SIADH et diabète insipide, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: SIADH: Maladi CNS, kansè nan poumon (SCLC), medikaman (SSRIs, carbamazepine), eta apre operasyon
DI: Traumatisme tèt, operasyon pituitè, timè nan sèvo, terapi litiyòm
clinicalPearls: SIADH: Restriksyon likid se priyorite a
DI: Ranplasan likid se priyorite a
Suivi nivo sodyòm chak 4-6 èdtan
diagnostics: Suivi nivo sodyòm nan san chak 4-6 èdtan
Suivi gravite espesifik pipi (wo nan SIADH, ba nan DI)
Atann nivo osmolalite san ak pipi yo ap mande
Suivi pwa chak jou
Atann panèl métabolik ap fèt regilyèman
Suivi entak ak pwodiksyon strik
management: SIADH: Enpoze restriksyon sou likid jan sa preskri
DI: Asire ranplasan likid adekwa jan sa preskri
Suivi to koreksyon sodyòm (evite koreksyon rapid)
Administre medikaman ki preskri yo (DDAVP pou DI, Tolvaptan pou SIADH)
Mantenir aksè IV jan sa preskri
Aplike prekosyon pou kriz (hyponatremia nan SIADH)
nursingActions: Suivi ak dokimante entak ak pwodiksyon avèk anpil atansyon
Pwa pasyan chak jou nan menm lè a sou menm balans lan
Rapòte chanjman oswa tandans nivo sodyòm nan san imedyatman
Evalye eta neral souvan (konfizyon, kriz nan SIADH)
Suivi siy de idratasyon nan DI (swaf, muko sèch, pòv turgor)
Rapòte chanjman nan pwodiksyon pipi (eksepsyonèl nan DI, diminye nan SIADH)
Edike sou restriksyon likid (SIADH) oswa ranplasman likid (DI)

medications.name: Desmopressin (DDAVP)
medications.action: Ranplase ADH ki manke nan DI
medications.pearl: Objektif la se diminye pwodiksyon pipi.

medications.name: Tolvaptan
medications.action: Bloke ADH nan SIADH
medications.pearl: Ogmente nivo sodyòm nan san.

quiz.question: Gravite espesifik 1.002 atann nan ki kondisyon?
quiz.rationale: DI rezilta nan gwo kantite pipi trè dilue ak yon gravite espesifik ki ba (<1.005).

hypothyroidism-basics.title: Hypothyroïdie
hypothyroidism-basics.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Hypothyroïdie, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
clinicalPearls: Suivi nivo TSH regilyèman
Pran 4-6 semèn pou ajisteman dòz yo montre efè total
Tretman pou tout lavi nesesè
Anseye siy ipotiroïdism (ranplase twòp): tachycardia, tremor, pèt pwa, entolerans chalè
diagnostics: Atann pou nivo TSH yo dwe mande (elevasyon nan ipotiroïdism primè)
Suivi nivo T4 gratis (diminye)
Atann pou panèl lipid (iperlipidemi se komen)
Suivi tandans pwa
Atann pou panèl metabolik pou baz
Suivi pou batman kè ak ritm
management: Administre levothyroxine jan yo preskri sou lestomak vid
Kenbe tan medikaman yo konsistan chak jou
Ogmente fib ak likid pou konstipasyon
Kenbe anviwònman an cho pou entolerans frèt
Suivi pou siy koma myxedema nan ka grav
Swiv ak founisè a pou ajisteman dòz ki baze sou TSH
nursingActions: Administre levothyroxine sou lestomak vid 30-60 minit anvan dejene
Suivi siy vital espesyalman batman kè (evalye pou bradycardia)
Edike pasyan an ke tretman an se pou tout lavi
Rapòte siy sou ranplase twòp (tachycardia, tremor, pèt pwa, entolerans chalè)
Suivi pou konstipasyon ak ankouraje fib dyetetik
Anseye pasyan an pou separe levothyroxine ak sipleman kalsyòm ak fè pa 4 èdtan

medications.name: Levothyroxine
medications.action: Ranplase T4 ki manke
medications.sideEffects: Siy ipotiroïdism si yo pran twòp (tachycardia, tremor, pèt pwa)
medications.pearl: Pran sou lestomak vid, 30-60 minit anvan dejene. Tan konsistan chak jou.

quiz.question: Kwhen pasyan an ta dwe pran Levothyroxine?
options: Sou lestomak vid, 30-60 minit anvan dejene
quiz.rationale: Levothyroxine ta dwe pran sou lestomak vid, 30-60 minit anvan dejene, paske manje (sitou kalsyòm ak fè) entèfere ak absòpsyon.

adrenal-insufficiency.title: Insuffisance surrénalienne
adrenal-insufficiency.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Insuffisance surrénalienne, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Tuberkiloz (yon koz ki te komen nan tan lontan)
clinicalPearls: Kriz Addisonian se MENAS POU LA VI: N/V, ipotansyon grav, chòk - trete ak IV hydrocortisone STAT ak bolus NS agresif
Pasyan an ta dwe mete braslè alèt medikal tout tan
DOUBLE dòz hydrocortisone pandan maladi minè, TRIPLE pou estrès/operasyon majè
JAMAI sispann kortikosteroid yo toudenkou - dwe diminye pou evite kriz
diagnostics: Suivi tansyon an (veye pou ipotansyon ortostatik)
Suivi glikoz nan san
Evalyasyon po pou iperpigmantasyon
Suivi tandans pwa
Evalye siy enbalans elektwolit
management: Administre hydrocortisone jan yo preskri (dosing estrès pandan maladi)
Suivi pou kriz Addisonian (ipotansyon grav, N/V, chòk)
Asire pasyan an mete idantifikasyon alèt medikal
JAMAI sispann kortikosteroid yo toudenkou
Rapòte siy kriz adrenal imedyatman
nursingActions: Suivi tansyon an ki enkli mezi ortostatik
Evalye nivo glikoz nan san regilyèman
Edike pasyan an sou dosing estrès (double dòz pandan maladi)
Asire braslè alèt medikal la toujou sou men pasyan an
Rapòte siy kriz (ipotansyon grav, feblès, doulè nan vant)
Edike sou bezwen medikaman ki dire tout lavi

medications.name: Hydrocortisone
medications.action: Ranplase kortisol ki manke pou repons metabolik ak estrès
medications.pearl: Dosing estrès: DOUBLE oswa TRIPLE dòz pandan maladi, blesi, oswa operasyon. Kriz Addisonian = IV hydrocortisone 100mg STAT + NS bolus.

medications.name: Fludrocortisone
medications.action: Ranplase aldosterone ki manke pou retansyon sodyòm/dlo
medications.pearl: Adrese gaspiye sodyòm ak ipokalemi. Suivi BP ak elektwolit regilyèman.

quiz.question: Ki sa ki tipikman deklanche yon kriz Addisonian (adrenal)?
options: Estrès fizyolojik (enfeksyon, operasyon, blesi) nan yon pasyan ki pa gen ase ranplase kortisol
quiz.rationale: Kriz Addisonian deklanche lè kò a fè fas ak estrès fizyolojik (enfeksyon, operasyon, blesi, maladi) men li pa ka pwodui ase kortisol pou reponn a estrès la. Pasyan yo dwe ogmante (dosing estrès) hydrocortisone yo pandan maladi pou evite kriz.

thyroidectomy.title: Thyroïdectomie
thyroidectomy.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Thyroïdectomie, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Maladi Graves (ki reziste a jesyon medikal)
clinicalPearls: Sipòte kou lè w ap repositionne (evite ipereksansyon nan sit chirijikal la)
Pozisyon semi-Fowler pou diminye edèm ak ankouraje drenaj
Tcheke pansman DÈYÈ - san akimile dèyè kou a
Calcium gluconate AK set trakeostomi bò kote kabann
Evalye kalite vwa chak 1-2 èdtan (vwa ki fè bri ka endike domaj nè)
Rapòte nenpòt difikilte respiratwa, stridor, oswa gonfle kou IMEDYATMAN
diagnostics: Evalyasyon kalite vwa (vwa ki fè bri endike blesi nan nè laryngeal rekiran)
Tcheke si gen siy Trousseau (spas karpòpèdal ak gonfle manch BP)
Tcheke si gen siy Chvostek (twitching figi lè w ap frape machwè)
Evalyasyon kou pou gonfle oswa hematom
Suiv estati respiratwa
management: Kenbe calcium gluconate bò kote kabann
Kenbe set trakeostomi bò kote kabann
Pozisyon nan pozisyon semi-Fowler
Sipòte kou lè w ap repositionne (evite ipereksansyon)
Tcheke pansman dèyè kou a pou san ki ap akimile
nursingActions: Suiv patansite airway ak estati respiratwa kontinyèlman
Evalye kalite vwa chak 1-2 èdtan apre operasyon an
Tcheke pou siy ipokalsemi (pikan, anestezi, kramp nan misk)
Suiv kou a pou gonfle oswa hematom
Rapòte stridor oswa difikilte respiratwa imedyatman
Tcheke pansman dèyè pou san (ki akimile dèyè kou)

left: Vwa ki fè bri/Chanjman vwa (blesi nan nè laryngeal rekiran)
Siy Chvostek (twitching figi lè w ap frape)

medications.name: Levothyroxine
medications.action: Ranplase T4 pou tout lavi apre total thyroidectomy
medications.pearl: Pran sou lestomak vid, 30-60 minit anvan dejene. Suiv nivo TSH regilyèman pou ajiste dòz.

medications.name: Calcium Gluconate IV
medications.action: Trete ipokalsemi simptomatik ki soti nan domaj parathyroid
medications.sideEffects: Bradycardia si yo bay twò vit
medications.pearl: Kenbe bò kote kabann apre thyroidectomy. Calcium oral + Vitamin D preskri si parathyroids domaje. Set trakeostomi tou kenbe bò kote kabann.

quiz.question: Ki evalyasyon ki pi enpòtan nan premye 24 èdtan apre thyroidectomy?
quiz.rationale: Priyorite a se swiv patansite airway paske yon hematom nan kou a ka rapidman konprese trake a ki lakòz obstriksyon airway. Evalye pou gonfle kou, stridor, ak difikilte respiratwa. Epitou swiv pou ipokalsemi (domaj parathyroid) ak siy Trousseau ak Chvostek.

siadh-basics-rpn.title: SIADH – RPN
siadh-basics-rpn.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl SIADH – RPN, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Small cell lung cancer (SCLC)  -  ectopic ADH production (most common malignant cause)
CNS disorders: head trauma, stroke, subarachnoid hemorrhage, meningitis, encephalitis
Pulmonary conditions: pneumonia, tuberculosis, positive-pressure ventilation
Medications: SSRIs, carbamazepine, cyclophosphamide, vincristine, opioids, NSAIDs
Post-surgical state (pain, anesthesia, and stress stimulate ADH release)
Elderly patients (multiple medication use and age-related ADH sensitivity)
clinicalPearls: RESTRIKSYON DLO se fondasyon tretman SIADH - pa sipleman sodyòm

Sendwòm Demyelination Osmotik (ODS, anvan sa yo te rele Central Pontine Myelinolysis) rive lè hyponatremia kwonik korije twò rapid: pèt dlo rapid nan selil sèvo yo retire kouch myelin yo, sa ki lakòz domaj pontine ki pa ka ranvèse ak dysarthria, dysphagia, ak quadriparesis
Sonje: SIADH = Serum dilue (ba osmolalite) + Pipi konsantre (wo osmolalite) + Euvolemia - triad sa a se mak dyagnostik la
SIADH se yon dyagnostik eksklizyon: dwe elimine ipotiroïdis, ensifizans adrenal, ak itilizasyon diurè anvan dyagnostike
siadh-basics-rpn.pathophysiology: SIADH soti nan sekresyon twòp nan òmòn antidiuretik (ADH/vasopressin) ki soti nan pitwitè pòs la oswa sous ektope, endepandan de estimi osmotik oswa volim nòmal. ADH aji sou reseptè V2 nan ti kanal ren yo, mete chanel aquaporin-2 ki dramatikman ogmante reabsòpsyon dlo nan filtrat tibulè tounen nan san an. Retansyon dlo patolojik sa a mennen nan elajisman volim likid ekstrasèlilè, hyponatremia dilisyon (serum Na souvan <130 mEq/L), diminye osmolalite serum (<275 mOsm/kg), ak pipi ki paradosalman konsantre (osmolalite >100 mOsm/kg) ak sodyòm pipi ki elve (>40 mEq/L). Serebral la se patikilyèman vilnerab: pandan serum sodyòm nan tonbe, dlo deplase nan selil sèvo yo atravè osmoz, sa ki lakòz edèm serebral. Hyponatremia modere (Na 125-134) lakòz tèt fè mal, kè plen, ak konfizyon. Hyponatremia grav (Na <120) ka deklanche kriz, koma, herniation nan tige serebral, ak lanmò. Enpòtan, pasyan an parèt euvolemic - pa gen edèm periferik, pa gen siy de idratasyon - paske dlo ki depase a distribye atravè dlo total kò a olye ke akimile nan yon konpatman vizib. Eta euvolemic sa a ak hypo-osmolalite se mak distenktif ki fè SIADH diferan de lòt koz hyponatremia.
diagnostics: Suiv nivo sodyòm serum chak 4-6 èdtan (atann ba: <135 mEq/L)
Atann osmolalite serum pou li ba (<275 mOsm/kg)
Suiv osmolalite pipi (ki konsantre inappropriément: >100 mOsm/kg)
Suiv sodyòm pipi (ki elve: >40 mEq/L nan eta euvolemic)
Atann gravite spesifik pipi pou li wo (>1.020)
Suiv pwa chak jou (pwa ogmante soti nan retansyon dlo)
Suiv strik antre ak sòti (diminye sòti pipi an rapò ak antre)
Atann panèl metabolik, kortisol, ak TSH pou elimine lòt koz
management: Enfòse restriksyon dlo jan sa preskri (tipikman 800-1000 mL/jou - sa a se TRETMAN PREMYE)
Administre hypertonic saline (3% NaCl) jan sa preskri pou hyponatremia grav ki gen sentòm (kriz, koma)
Suiv pousantaj koreksyon sodyòm ak anpil atansyon (maksimòm 8-10 mEq/L nan 24 èdtan pou evite sendwòm demyelination osmotik)
Administre Tolvaptan jan sa preskri pou SIADH kwonik ki pa reponn a restriksyon dlo
Mantenir aksè IV jan sa preskri
Mete an plas prekosyon kriz pou hyponatremia (Na <120 mEq/L)
Idantifye ak trete koz ki anba a (sispann medikaman ki fè mal, trete enfeksyon/malinans)
Mantenir rejim alimantè ki gen sodyòm jan sa preskri (pa limite antre sodyòm)
nursingActions: Suiv ak dokimante antre ak sòti ak anpil atansyon chak èdtan pandan faz akit
Pwa pasyan an chak jou nan menm lè a sou menm balans (pwa ogmante endike kontinye retansyon dlo)
Rapòte chanjman oswa tandans sodyòm serum imedyatman bay founisè a
Evalye eta nè yo souvan: nivo konsyans, konfizyon, tèt fè mal, aktivite kriz
Mete an plas prekosyon kriz si sodyòm <125 mEq/L (rail sou kote ak kousen, aspirasyon bò kabann)
Edike pasyan an ak fanmi sou restriksyon dlo ak enpòtans konfòmite
Suiv siy sendwòm demyelination osmotik pandan koreksyon (dysarthria, dysphagia, quadriparesis)
Rapòte nenpòt nouvo sentòm nè pandan koreksyon sodyòm imedyatman

right: Pipi ki konsantre malgre serum dilue
Euvolemia (Pa gen edèm, Pa gen idratasyon)

medications.name: Tolvaptan (Samsca)
medications.action: Bloke aksyon ADH nan reseptè V2 ti kanal yo, ankouraje egzeyat dlo gratis (aquaresis) san pèdi sodyòm
medications.sideEffects: Swaf, bouch sèch, polyuria, hypernatremia (risk koreksyon twòp), hepatotoxicity
medications.contra: Hyponatremia hypovolemic, pasyan anuric, pa kapab santi oswa reponn a swaf, inibitè fò CYP3A4, maladi fwa
medications.pearl: Dwe inisye NAN LOPITAL ak siveyans sere sodyòm chak 6-8 èdtan. Suiv pou rapid sodyòm koreksyon twòp. Pa itilize pou >30 jou (risk hepatotoxicity). Liberalize restriksyon dlo yon fwa li kòmanse.

medications.name: 3% Hypertonic Saline
medications.action: Direkteman ogmante konsantrasyon sodyòm serum nan bay sodyòm klorid konsantre
medications.sideEffects: Sendwòm demyelination osmotik si koreksyon fèt twò rapid, chaj volim, phlebitis
medications.pearl: Rezève pou hyponatremia grav ki gen sentòm (kriz, koma, obtundation). Koreksyon sodyòm pa dwe fèt pi vit pase 8-10 mEq/L nan 24 èdtan. Liy santral pi prefere pou konsantrasyon >3%. Tcheke sodyòm chak 2-4 èdtan pandan enfizyon.

quiz.question: Yon pasyan ki gen SIADH gen yon sodyòm serum 118 mEq/L e li ap fè kriz. Founisè a preskri 3% hypertonic saline. Ki sa ki pi enpòtan pou enfimyè a konsidere?
options: Infuze saline a pi rapid posib pou sispann kriz yo
Suiv ke sodyòm pa ogmante plis pase 8-10 mEq/L nan 24 èdtan
Restriksyon dlo oral a 500 mL/jou an menm tan
Kenbe tout lòt IV ak diurè yo pou tout tan
quiz.rationale: Pi gwo konsidere enfimyè a lè l ap administre 3% hypertonic saline se swiv pousantaj koreksyon sodyòm. Sodyòm serum pa dwe ogmante plis pase 8-10 mEq/L nan 24 èdtan. Koreksyon twò rapid lakòz sendwòm demyelination osmotik (ODS), yon kondisyon nè ki pa ka ranvèse. Nivo sodyòm yo dwe tcheke chak 2-4 èdtan pandan enfizyon an.

acromegaly-basics-rpn.title: Acromégalie – RPN
acromegaly-basics-rpn.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Acromégalie – RPN, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Adenoma pituitè ki sekrè GH (>95% ka yo)
Sekresyon GHRH ectopic soti nan timè neuroendokrin (ra)
clinicalPearls: Ogmantasyon gwosè bag ak soulye sou ane yo se yon plent klasik pasyan - konpare foto ansyen pou dokimante chanjman pwogresif nan figi
Maladi kadyovaskilè se prensipal koz lanmò nan akromegali - fè depistaj agresif pou ipertansyon, kadyomyopati, ak dyabèt

Distingue de GIGANTISM: menm patoloji anplis GH, men gigantism rive ANVAN fèmti epiphyseal (timoun) ki lakòz kwasans lineyè twòp; akromegali rive APRÈ fèmti (granmoun) ki lakòz agrandisman ak tisi mou
Apre operasyon transsphenoidal, gade pou drenaj nasal klè (CSF rhinorrhea) - fè pasyan an penche an avans epi teste likid la pou glikoz (glikoz CSF wo)
acromegaly-basics-rpn.pathophysiology: Akromegali se rezilta yon sekresyon kwonik anplis òm kwasans (GH) nan granmoun apre fèmti plak epiphyseal yo. Nan plis pase 95% ka yo, sous la se yon adenoma pituitè ki sekrè GH (adenoma somatotrof) nan glann pituitè anvan an. GH stimule fwa a pou pwodui faktè kwasans ki sanble ak ensilin 1 (IGF-1), ki se medyatè prensipal efè tisi GH. IGF-1 ankouraje pwoliferasyon zo, kartilaj, tisi mou, ak ògàn visseral. Paske plak kwasans yo te fonn nan granmoun, anplis GH pa ka ogmante wotè - olye de sa, li lakòz aplikasyon zo periosteal (lajman ak epesè) nan men, pye, machwè (prognatism), ak kràn, ansanm ak ipertrofi tisi mou nan lang (macroglossia), po, ak ògàn entèn (organomegali). Konplikasyon kadyovaskilè yo se prensipal koz lanmò: anplis GH/IGF-1 lakòz kadyomyopati (ipertrofi biventricular), ateroskleroz akselere, ak ipertansyon. Efè metabolik yo enkli rezistans ensilin ak dyabèt mellitus (GH se yon òm kontwòl ki antagonize aksyon ensilin nan misk skelet ak fwa). Adenoma pituitè a li menm ka lakòz sentòm efè mas: konpresyon chiasm optik (bitemporal hemianopia), doulè tèt, ak hypopituitarism soti nan destriksyon tisi nòmal ki antoure pituitè a.
diagnostics: Atann nivo IGF-1 nan san an ap ogmante (tès depistaj prensipal)
Atann tès tolerans glikoz oral ak mezi GH (GH pa ka bese anba 1 ng/mL - tès konfime)
Atann MRI pituitè pou vizyalize adenoma a (>70% se macroadenomas >10mm)
Suivi tès jaden vizyèl (perimetry fòmèl pou bitemporal hemianopia)
Suivi glikoz san ak HbA1c (depistaj dyabèt)
Atann evalyasyon lòt òm pituitè yo (prolaktin, TSH, ACTH, FSH/LH - efè mas)
Suivi ekokardiogram (depistaj kadyomyopati)
Atann etid dòmi si sentòm apne dòmi prezan
management: Prepare pasyan an pou operasyon transsphenoidal jan yo te mande (premye tretman definitif)
Administre octreotide (analòg somatostatin) jan yo preskri pou sispann sekresyon GH
Administre cabergoline jan yo preskri si prolaktin anwo
Administre pegvisomant jan yo preskri (antagonis reseptè GH) pou maladi refraktè
Suivi glikoz san ak anpil atansyon (rezistans ensilin ak dyabèt yo komen)
Kowòdone suiv ophtalmoloji pou suiv jaden vizyèl
Suivi pou siy hypopituitarism apre operasyon (kriz adrenal, ipotiroïdism)
Edike sou suiv nivo IGF-1 pou tout lavi
nursingActions: Suivi pou siy ogmantasyon presyon intracranial (doulè tèt, chanjman vizyèl, kè plen)
Evalye akuiti vizyèl ak rapò nenpòt defisi jaden vizyèl
Suivi nivo glikoz san (GH lakòz rezistans ensilin)
Evalye eta kadyovaskilè (ipertansyon, siy echèk kè)
Suivi pou konplikasyon apre operasyon transsphenoidal: koule CSF (rhinorrhea), meningit, dyabèt insipidus
Evalye pou siy hypopituitarism (fatig, ipotansyon, tolerans frèt)
Dokimante chanjman fizik pwogresif pou konparezon (gwosè bag, gwosè soulye, foto)
Edike pasyan an ke chanjman tisi mou yo ka yon ti jan ranvèse ak tretman men chanjman zo yo se pèmanan

left: Men ak Pye Agrandi (ogmantasyon gwosè bag/soulye)
Karakteristik Fasyal Gros (frontal bossing, souri pwononse)

medications.name: Octreotide (Sandostatin LAR)
medications.action: Lye ak reseptè somatostatin sou selil somatotrof yo, sispann sekresyon GH ak IGF-1 epi li ka diminye adenoma a
medications.sideEffects: Kalkil bil (diminye motilite vésicule biliaire), dyare/steatorrhea, kramp abdominal, iperglikemi oswa ipoglikemi
medications.pearl: Fòmil LAR depo a bay IM chak 4 semèn. Suivi vésicule biliaire ak ultrason. Ka ogmante kontwòl glikoz. Itilize anvan operasyon pou diminye gwo timè oswa apre operasyon si maladi reziduel.

medications.name: Pegvisomant (Somavert)
medications.action: Bloke GH pou l pa lye ak reseptè li, nòmalize nivo IGF-1 san diminye sekresyon GH
medications.sideEffects: Reyaksyon nan sit piki, ogmantasyon anzim fwa, lipodystrophy
medications.pearl: Pa diminye nivo GH oswa gwosè timè - sèlman bloke aksyon GH periferik. Suivi LFT chak mwa pou premye 6 mwa. Itilize pou maladi ki reziste a operasyon ak analòg somatostatin.

quiz.question: Yon pasyan ki gen akromegali ap prepare pou operasyon transsphenoidal. Apre operasyon an, enfimyè a remake gen drenaj klè soti nan nen pasyan an. Kisa enfimyè a ta dwe fè PREMYE?
options: Sèvi ak yon sèvyèt pou siye drenaj la epi dokimante kantite la
Teste drenaj la pou kontni glikoz (suspekte koule CSF)
Pozisyon pasyan an plat nan kabann
quiz.rationale: Drenaj nasal klè apre operasyon transsphenoidal ka endike yon koule likid serebral (CSF). Enfimyè a ta dwe teste likid la pou glikoz - CSF gen yon kontni glikoz ki wo, pandan y ap mukus nasal pa genyen. Yon koule CSF mande entèvansyon medikal imedya pou anpeche meningit. Nen yo pa dwe JAMA pakè, epi pasyan an ta dwe pozisyone ak tèt kabann lan leve.

prolactinoma-basics.title: Prolactinome
prolactinoma-basics.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Prolactinome, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Female sex (more commonly diagnosed in reproductive-age women)
Medications that block dopamine: antipsychotics, metoclopramide, risperidone
Chest wall irritation (herpes zoster, surgical scars)
clinicalPearls: Prolactinomas are the ONLY pituitary adenomas where MEDICATION is first-line treatment  -  all other pituitary adenomas typically require surgery first
Prolactin level roughly correlates with tumor size: PRL >200 ng/mL almost always indicates a macroprolactinoma (not just stalk effect)

The 'stalk effect' or 'hook effect': any mass compressing the pituitary stalk interrupts dopamine delivery and mildly elevates prolactin (<100 ng/mL). A giant adenoma with only mildly elevated prolactin is likely a NON-functioning adenoma causing stalk compression, NOT a prolactinoma
Dopamine agonists can shrink prolactinomas dramatically  -  monitor for CSF rhinorrhea as large suprasellar tumors shrink away from the skull base

thyrotoxicosis-basics.title: Thyrotoxicose
thyrotoxicosis-basics.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Thyrotoxicose, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Untreated or undertreated Graves' disease (most common underlying cause)
Infection or sepsis in a hyperthyroid patient (most common precipitant)
Surgery (especially thyroid surgery without adequate preoperative preparation)
DKA or other acute metabolic derangements
clinicalPearls: Medication ORDER matters in thyroid storm: PTU first → wait 1 hour → THEN iodide. Giving iodide before PTU provides raw material for MORE hormone synthesis (Jod-Basedow phenomenon)

NEVER give aspirin for fever in thyrotoxicosis  -  aspirin displaces T4 from thyroid-binding globulin, dramatically increasing FREE (active) T4 levels and worsening the crisis. Use acetaminophen only.
Thyroid storm has a Burch-Wartofsky Point Scale ≥45 (scores temperature, CNS effects, GI-hepatic dysfunction, heart rate, heart failure, atrial fibrillation, and precipitating event)
Graves' disease is the most common cause of thyrotoxicosis overall  -  look for the triad of hyperthyroidism + exophthalmos + pretibial myxedema

np-testbank-advanced-assessment.title: NP Advanced Assessment Test Bank
np-testbank-advanced-assessment.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl NP Advanced Assessment Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Incomplete history-taking leading to missed diagnoses
Failure to perform age-appropriate screening examinations
Over-reliance on diagnostic testing without thorough physical examination
Cognitive biases: anchoring, premature closure, confirmation bias
Inadequate social determinants of health assessment
Failure to assess medication adherence and polypharmacy
Missing red flag symptoms requiring urgent referral
Incomplete family history for genetic risk stratification
clinicalPearls: Always assess for red flags in headache: thunderclap onset, worst headache of life, fever with neck stiffness, new onset after age 50, focal neurological deficits, papilledema
The SAAG (serum-ascites albumin gradient) ≥1.1 g/dL indicates portal hypertension; <1.1 suggests peritoneal malignancy, TB, or nephrotic syndrome
BNP <100 pg/mL effectively rules out heart failure; BNP >400 strongly suggests decompensated HF; values between 100-400 require clinical correlation
In acute coronary syndrome, troponin elevation with a rise-and-fall pattern distinguishes acute MI from chronic troponin elevation seen in CKD or stable HF
The Wells score for PE: >6 points = high probability, proceed directly to CTPA; ≤4 points = low probability, obtain D-dimer first
A normal D-dimer has >95% negative predictive value for PE/DVT; however, it is elevated in pregnancy, malignancy, infection, surgery, and advanced age, limiting specificity
Orthostatic hypotension is defined as a drop in systolic BP ≥20 mmHg or diastolic BP ≥10 mmHg within 3 minutes of standing; assess in all patients with dizziness or syncope
The CHA2DS2-VASc score determines anticoagulation need in atrial fibrillation: score ≥2 in males or ≥3 in females warrants anticoagulation (DOAC preferred over warfarin)

np-testbank-prescribing.title: NP Prescribing & Pharmacotherapeutics Test Bank
np-testbank-prescribing.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl NP Prescribing & Pharmacotherapeutics Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Polypharmacy (≥5 medications) increasing drug interaction risk
Renal impairment requiring dose adjustments for renally cleared drugs
Hepatic impairment affecting drug metabolism (CYP450 system)
Genetic polymorphisms in CYP2D6, CYP2C19, CYP2C9 altering drug metabolism
Extremes of age: neonates (immature metabolism) and elderly (declining organ function)
Pregnancy and lactation requiring careful risk-benefit analysis
Non-adherence due to cost, complexity, or side effects
Herbal supplement interactions (St. John's Wort induces CYP3A4, reducing drug levels)
clinicalPearls: CYP3A4 inhibitors (ketoconazole, erythromycin, grapefruit juice, ritonavir) increase levels of most statins, CCBs, benzodiazepines, and many other drugs; always check for interactions
CYP2D6 poor metabolizers cannot convert codeine to morphine, making it ineffective for pain; ultra-rapid metabolizers produce excessive morphine, risking fatal respiratory depression
When switching from an ACE inhibitor to sacubitril/valsartan (Entresto), a 36-hour washout period is mandatory to prevent life-threatening angioedema from dual neprilysin and ACE inhibition
Fluoroquinolones carry FDA black box warnings for tendon rupture, peripheral neuropathy, CNS effects, and aortic dissection; reserve for infections without safer alternatives
Methotrexate requires folate supplementation (folic acid 1mg daily) to reduce toxicity; monitor CBC, hepatic panel, and renal function; teratogenic (Category X) requiring contraception

The Beers Criteria identifies medications to avoid in elderly patients: benzodiazepines (fall risk), first-generation antihistamines (anticholinergic), long-acting sulfonylureas (hypoglycemia), and NSAIDs (GI/renal risk)
PTU is preferred over methimazole in first trimester pregnancy (methimazole associated with aplasia cutis and choanal atresia); switch to methimazole in second/third trimester
Warfarin is dosed based on INR response, not fixed dosing; genetic testing for CYP2C9 and VKORC1 polymorphisms can guide initial dosing

np-testbank-differential-diagnosis.title: NP Differential Diagnosis Test Bank
np-testbank-differential-diagnosis.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl NP Differential Diagnosis Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Cognitive biases leading to diagnostic error (anchoring, premature closure, availability heuristic)
Incomplete history-taking missing critical red flags
Atypical disease presentations in elderly, immunocompromised, or diabetic patients
Low index of suspicion for rare but life-threatening conditions
Failure to consider demographic-specific risks (age, sex, race, occupation)
Communication barriers (language, health literacy, cultural differences)
Time pressure in clinical settings reducing thorough evaluation
Over-reliance on technology and testing without clinical correlation
clinicalPearls: The 'Big 6' must-not-miss diagnoses for acute chest pain: MI, aortic dissection, PE, tension pneumothorax, cardiac tamponade, and esophageal rupture — all require rapid identification to prevent death

Aortic dissection is the great mimicker: it can present as MI (coronary ostia involvement), stroke (carotid involvement), acute limb ischemia (iliac involvement), or renal failure (renal artery involvement)

A negative D-dimer (with appropriate pretest probability per PERC or Wells) effectively rules out PE/DVT; however, D-dimer loses utility in hospitalized patients, post-surgical patients, and those with active malignancy
In acute monoarticular arthritis, always perform arthrocentesis to rule out septic arthritis before attributing to gout or pseudogout; septic arthritis is a surgical emergency
Troponin elevation is NOT specific for MI: other causes include PE, myocarditis, heart failure, renal failure, sepsis, and demand ischemia — clinical context determines the diagnosis

Temporal arteritis (giant cell arteritis) in patients >50 with new headache, jaw claudication, visual changes, or elevated ESR >50 requires immediate empiric corticosteroids pending temporal artery biopsy to prevent irreversible blindness

The HEART score (History, ECG, Age, Risk factors, Troponin) stratifies chest pain patients: 0-3 = low risk (safe for discharge with follow-up), 4-6 = moderate (observation), 7-10 = high risk (admission and intervention)
Ectopic pregnancy must be on the differential for any reproductive-age female presenting with abdominal/pelvic pain — always obtain a beta-hCG before imaging

np-testbank-emergency-management.title: NP Emergency & Complex Management Test Bank
np-testbank-emergency-management.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl NP Emergency & Complex Management Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Delayed recognition of sepsis leading to increased mortality (each hour delay in antibiotics increases mortality 7.6%)
Missed STEMI due to atypical presentation (elderly, women, diabetics may lack typical chest pain)
Inappropriate insulin administration in DKA with hypokalemia (<3.3 mEq/L) risking cardiac arrest
Rapid correction of chronic hyponatremia causing osmotic demyelination syndrome
Failure to recognize and treat tension pneumothorax (clinical diagnosis, do not delay for imaging)
Missed massive PE in patients with unexplained hemodynamic instability
Inadequate fluid resuscitation volume in septic shock (minimum 30 mL/kg crystalloid)
Over-reliance on fever for infection identification (immunocompromised patients may be afebrile with severe infection)
clinicalPearls: In septic shock, every hour delay in antibiotic administration increases mortality by approximately 7.6% — administer broad-spectrum antibiotics within 1 hour of recognition, even before culture results
Never start insulin in DKA until potassium is confirmed >3.3 mEq/L — insulin drives potassium intracellularly and can cause fatal hypokalemia and cardiac arrest

Chronic hyponatremia correction must not exceed 8-10 mEq/L in 24 hours to prevent osmotic demyelination syndrome (central pontine myelinolysis) — if overcorrected, administer desmopressin (DDAVP) to re-lower sodium
Tension pneumothorax is a CLINICAL diagnosis — do not delay treatment for imaging; perform needle decompression at the 2nd intercostal space, midclavicular line, followed by chest tube placement
In massive PE with hemodynamic instability, systemic thrombolysis with alteplase (100mg IV over 2 hours) is indicated even with relative contraindications when the patient is in extremis

The treatment sequence for thyroid storm is critical: beta-blocker FIRST (symptom control), then PTU (blocks synthesis AND peripheral conversion), then iodine solution ONE HOUR after PTU (blocks hormone release, but if given before PTU, provides substrate for more hormone), then corticosteroids (blocks T4-to-T3 conversion and treats relative adrenal insufficiency)

In right ventricular infarction (inferior STEMI with right-sided ST elevation in V4R), avoid nitroglycerin and diuretics as they reduce preload, worsening RV output; administer IV fluids to maintain preload

Calcium gluconate in hyperkalemia stabilizes the cardiac membrane but does NOT lower potassium — always follow with potassium-shifting agents (insulin/dextrose, albuterol) and elimination therapies (kayexalate, dialysis)

rn-testbank-cardiovascular.title: RN Cardiovascular Test Bank
rn-testbank-cardiovascular.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RN Cardiovascular Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Family history of premature CAD (men < 55, women < 65)
clinicalPearls: Door-to-balloon time for STEMI should be < 90 minutes; every minute of delay increases myocardial necrosis
Right ventricular infarction (inferior MI with ST elevation in V4R) contraindicates nitroglycerin and diuretics—these patients are preload-dependent
Troponin begins rising 3-6 hours post-MI; a negative result at presentation does not rule out MI—repeat at 3-6 hours
New-onset atrial fibrillation requires rate control first, then rhythm control consideration; anticoagulate if CHA2DS2-VASc ≥ 2
Hypomagnesemia and hypokalemia together predispose to torsades de pointes—always check and replace both simultaneously
Cardiac tamponade requires emergent pericardiocentesis; do NOT administer diuretics as these patients need volume
Post-CABG patients: monitor for mediastinal shift, graft occlusion (ECG changes), and sternal wound infection
Sacubitril/valsartan (Entresto) requires 36-hour washout from ACE inhibitors to prevent life-threatening angioedema

rn-testbank-respiratory.title: RN Respiratory Test Bank
rn-testbank-respiratory.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RN Respiratory Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
clinicalPearls: ARDS Berlin criteria: mild PaO2/FiO2 200-300, moderate 100-200, severe < 100 on PEEP ≥ 5 cmH2O
Lung-protective ventilation: tidal volume 6-8 mL/kg ideal body weight, plateau pressure < 30 cmH2O to prevent VILI
Post-pneumonectomy: NEVER position on the non-operative side—this causes mediastinal shift compressing the remaining lung
Chest tube drainage > 100-200 mL/hr is excessive and suggests hemorrhage—report immediately and prepare for surgical intervention
RSBI (RR/TV) > 105 predicts weaning failure; resume ventilatory support and address contributing factors
For PE: Wells score > 6 = high probability → proceed directly to CTPA; skip D-dimer testing
Tension pneumothorax is a clinical diagnosis requiring emergent needle decompression at the 2nd intercostal space, midclavicular line—do not wait for imaging
ABG interpretation: pH determines acidosis vs alkalosis; PaCO2 is the respiratory component; HCO3 is the metabolic component

rn-testbank-neuro.title: RN Neurological Test Bank
rn-testbank-neuro.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RN Neurological Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Hypercoagulable states (Factor V Leiden, antiphospholipid syndrome)
clinicalPearls: Time is brain: each minute of untreated large-vessel stroke destroys ~1.9 million neurons; door-to-needle time for tPA should be < 60 minutes
CPP = MAP - ICP; maintain CPP 60-70 mmHg. Interventions to raise MAP or lower ICP are equally valid approaches
Cushing triad (hypertension, bradycardia, abnormal respirations) is a LATE sign of increased ICP indicating brainstem herniation—do not wait for this to intervene
Autonomic dysreflexia in SCI above T6: sit patient upright immediately, identify and remove trigger (full bladder is most common), treat hypertension if BP remains dangerously elevated
Vital capacity < 20 mL/kg in Guillain-Barré syndrome indicates impending respiratory failure—prepare for elective intubation rather than emergent
Status epilepticus protocol: benzodiazepine first (lorazepam IV) → second-line agent (fosphenytoin, valproic acid, levetiracetam) → refractory treatment (propofol, midazolam drip)
After tPA administration: no anticoagulants, antiplatelets, or invasive procedures for 24 hours. Perform neuro checks every 15 minutes x 2 hours, then every 30 minutes x 6 hours
Diabetes insipidus post-pituitary surgery: massive dilute urine (> 200 mL/hr), specific gravity < 1.005, rising serum sodium and osmolality. Treat with desmopressin (DDAVP).

rn-testbank-critical-care.title: RN Critical Care Test Bank
rn-testbank-critical-care.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RN Critical Care Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Chronic organ dysfunction (heart failure, COPD, CKD, cirrhosis)
clinicalPearls: Surviving Sepsis Campaign hour-1 bundle: measure lactate, blood cultures, broad-spectrum antibiotics, 30 mL/kg crystalloid for hypotension or lactate ≥ 4, and vasopressors for MAP < 65 after fluids
Lactate clearance > 10% in 2-6 hours is a positive prognostic sign; persistently elevated lactate indicates ongoing tissue hypoperfusion
DIC treatment: treat the underlying cause first. Replace consumed factors with cryoprecipitate (fibrinogen < 100), FFP (prolonged PT/INR), and platelets (< 20,000 or < 50,000 with active bleeding)
Propofol infusion syndrome (PRIS) is fatal if not recognized early: unexplained metabolic acidosis + rhabdomyolysis + hyperkalemia + hyperlipidemia → discontinue propofol immediately
Adequate urine output in adults is ≥ 0.5 mL/kg/hr. In a 70 kg patient, minimum acceptable output is 35 mL/hr
Ranson criteria for acute pancreatitis: score ≥ 3 indicates severe disease; score ≥ 6 predicts > 50% mortality
Compartment syndrome: pain out of proportion to injury + pain with passive stretch is the earliest sign. Absent pulses is a LATE finding—fasciotomy needed before pulse loss
CRRT filter clotting: adjust anticoagulation protocol (regional citrate is preferred over heparin in most centers). Monitor ionized calcium with citrate anticoagulation.

rn-testbank-pharmacology.title: RN Pharmacology Test Bank
rn-testbank-pharmacology.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RN Pharmacology Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Extremes of age (neonates and elderly have altered pharmacokinetics)
Low body weight or malnutrition (altered volume of distribution)
Pregnancy and lactation (altered physiology, fetal considerations)
History of adverse drug reactions or allergies
clinicalPearls: Narrow therapeutic index drugs requiring level monitoring: digoxin (0.5-2.0), lithium (0.6-1.2), phenytoin (10-20), theophylline (10-20), vancomycin (trough 15-20 for serious infections), aminoglycosides (trough < 2)
Red Man Syndrome from vancomycin is a RATE-RELATED histamine reaction, NOT a true allergy. Slow the infusion; do not document as allergy
Amiodarone requires monitoring of lungs (PFTs), thyroid (TFTs), liver (LFTs), and eyes (ophthalmologic exam)—mnemonic: 'Amio affects the BODY from lungs to eyes'
Never give nitroglycerin to a patient who has taken a PDE5 inhibitor (sildenafil/tadalafil) within 24-48 hours—risk of fatal hypotension
When reversing opioid toxicity with naloxone, titrate to adequate respirations (RR > 12), not to complete pain reversal—prevents acute withdrawal and maintains analgesia
ACE inhibitors must be stopped 36 hours before starting sacubitril/valsartan to prevent angioedema. ACE inhibitor cough is caused by bradykinin accumulation—switch to ARB if intolerable
Phenytoin (Dilantin) toxicity progression: nystagmus at 20 mcg/mL → ataxia at 30 mcg/mL → lethargy/confusion at 40 mcg/mL → seizures paradoxically at > 50 mcg/mL
Carbamazepine requires baseline CBC due to risk of aplastic anemia and agranulocytosis. Teach patients to report fever, sore throat, easy bruising, and oral ulcers.

rn-testbank-maternal-child.title: RN Maternal-Child Test Bank
rn-testbank-maternal-child.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RN Maternal-Child Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: History of preeclampsia in previous pregnancies
Substance use during pregnancy (alcohol, tobacco, illicit drugs)
clinicalPearls: Magnesium sulfate toxicity progression: loss of DTRs at 7-10 mEq/L → respiratory depression at 10-12 mEq/L → cardiac arrest at > 15 mEq/L. Antidote is calcium gluconate 1 g IV push

Cord prolapse management: elevate the presenting part (gloved hand pushing upward), place patient in Trendelenburg or knee-chest position, administer oxygen, keep cord moist with warm saline, prepare for emergent cesarean

Late decelerations indicate uteroplacental insufficiency—nadir occurs AFTER contraction peak. Interventions: left lateral positioning, IV fluid bolus, stop oxytocin, administer oxygen, notify provider
Congenital diaphragmatic hernia triad: scaphoid abdomen, respiratory distress, bowel sounds in chest. Do NOT bag-mask ventilate (forces air into stomach, worsening thoracic compression)
Postpartum hemorrhage: uterine atony is the #1 cause (4 T's: Tone, Trauma, Tissue, Thrombin). Fundal massage is the first intervention; administer uterotonics as ordered
APGAR scoring at 1 and 5 minutes: Appearance (color), Pulse, Grimace (reflex), Activity (muscle tone), Respirations. Score 7-10 is normal; < 7 requires intervention
Gestational diabetes screening: 1-hour glucose challenge test (50 g) at 24-28 weeks; if ≥ 140 mg/dL, proceed to 3-hour glucose tolerance test (100 g)
Preeclampsia with severe features: BP ≥ 160/110, platelets < 100,000, liver enzymes 2x normal, creatinine > 1.1, pulmonary edema, cerebral/visual symptoms. Delivery is the definitive treatment.

rpn-testbank-cardiovascular.title: RPN Cardiovascular Test Bank
rpn-testbank-cardiovascular.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RPN Cardiovascular Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
rpn-testbank-cardiovascular.pathophysiology: Kèk kesyon pratik siplemantè sou kadyovaskilè.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan gen furosemide (Lasix) preskri. Ki valè laboratwa enfimyè a ta dwe siveye ak rapòte?
quiz.rationale: Furosemide se yon diurèti siklè ki lakòz pèt potasyòm. Hypokalemi ka mennen nan disritmi kadyak e li dwe rapòte rapidman.

quiz.question: Ki pulsasyon enfimyè a ta dwe evalye anvan li administre digoxin?
options: Pulsasyon apikal pou yon minit konplè
quiz.rationale: Pulsasyon apikal dwe konte pou yon minit konplè anvan yo bay digoxin. Sispann medikaman an epi rapòte si to a anba 60 bpm.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen ensifizans kadyak rapòte li dòmi sou twa zòrye pou respire. Ki sa yo rele sa a?
quiz.rationale: Orthopnea se difikilte pou respire lè ou kouche plat, sa ki mande pou leve tèt la ak zòrye. Li endike redistribisyon likid nan ensifizans kadyak.

quiz.question: Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe rapòte imedyatman nan yon kliyan ki fè katetè kadyak?
options: Ti blesi nan sit enplantasyon an
Pye ki frèt, pal sou bò afekte a
Kliyan ki mande medikaman pou doulè
quiz.rationale: Yon ekstremite frèt, pal ki lwen sit enplantasyon katetè a sijere okklizyon atè oswa fòmasyon tromb, sa ki mande rapò imedyat.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki sou heparin gen yon aPTT ki se 120 segond. Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe fè?
options: Kontinye enfizyon an jan sa te preskri
Rapòte rezilta a bay enfimyè ki an chaj la
quiz.rationale: Nòmal aPTT se 25-35 segond; ranje terapetik sou heparin se 1.5-2.5 fwa nòmal. Yon valè 120 se kritikman elve, ogmante risk pou senyen. Enfimyè a dwe rapòte imedyatman.

quiz.question: Ki enstriksyon dyetetik enfimyè a ta dwe ranfòse pou yon kliyan ki pran warfarin?
options: Mantenir konsomasyon konstan manje ki gen vitamin K
Elimine tout manje ki gen vitamin K
Manje plis brokoli pou ogmante koagilasyon
quiz.rationale: Kliyan ki sou warfarin ta dwe kenbe konsomasyon vitamin K konstan olye de elimine li, paske chanjman souden ka afekte nivo INR ak efikasite antikoagilasyon.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen maladi vaskilè periferik rapòte doulè nan janm pandan li ap mache ki rezoud ak repo. Ki sa sentòm sa a ye?
quiz.rationale: Claudication entèmitan se doulè nan janm ki fèt pandan egzèsis ki rezoud ak repo, ki koze pa mank de koule san atè nan misk yo pandan demann ogmante.

quiz.question: Ki pozisyon enfimyè a ta dwe mete yon kliyan ki ap fè yon kriz ipertansif?
quiz.rationale: Pozisyon Semi-Fowler ede diminye retou venoz ak diminye chaj kadyak, sa ki ede bese presyon san pandan yon kriz ipertansif.

preTest.question: Yon lekti presyon san kliyan an se 88/52 mmHg ak yon to batman kè 120 bpm. Ki aksyon enfimyè a ta dwe pran an premye?
options: Ankouraje kliyan an pou bwè likid
preTest.rationale: Sa a reprezante ipotansyon enpòtan ak takikardi konpansatwa, ki endike posib chòk. Rapò imedyat se esansyèl pou entèvansyon alè.

preTest.question: Ki siy enfimyè a ta dwe siveye nan yon kliyan ki resevwa transfizyon san?
options: Fèv, frison, doulè nan do, ak urtikarya
preTest.rationale: Fèv, frison, doulè nan do, ak urtikarya se siy yon reyaksyon transfizyon. Enfimyè a dwe sispann transfizyon an imedyatman epi rapòte rezilta sa yo.

rpn-testbank-respiratory.title: RPN Respiratory Test Bank
rpn-testbank-respiratory.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RPN Respiratory Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen COPD gen yon saturasyon oksijèn 88%. Ki livrezon oksijèn enfimyè a ta dwe antisipe?
quiz.rationale: Kliyan ki gen COPD gen yon kondwi ipoksik pou respire. Oksijèn ki gen gwo koule ka siprime kondwi respiratwa yo. Oksijèn ki gen ti koule nan 1-2 L/min atravè nasal cannula se pi an sekirite.

quiz.question: Ki son respiratwa enfimyè a ta dwe rapòte nan yon kliyan ki gen pneumoni?
options: Son vesikilè nan lob anba yo
Son bronkial sou jaden pou periferik
Son bronkovesikilè tou pre sternòm lan
quiz.rationale: Son bronkial ki tande sou jaden pou periferik yo endike konsolidasyon (likid/pus ki ranpli alvèy yo), ki karakteristik pou pneumoni e ki ta dwe rapòte.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan gen yon tib pwatrin. Enfimyè a remake gen boukl kontinyèl nan chanm sele dlo a. Sa a ki sa sa endike?
options: Yon fuite lè nan sistèm nan
quiz.rationale: Boukl kontinyèl nan chanm sele dlo a endike yon fuite lè. Enfimyè a ta dwe tcheke tout koneksyon yo epi rapòte sa.

quiz.question: Ki pozisyon enfimyè a ta dwe itilize pou yon kliyan ki gen pneumothorax sou bò dwat pandan yon thoracentesis?
options: Chita dwat ak koube devan sou yon tab bò kabann
Sou do ak bra sou kote
quiz.rationale: Chita dwat ak koube devan elaji côtes yo e pèmèt aksè optimal nan espas pleural la pou retire likid oswa lè.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki ap itilize yon metered-dose inhaler (MDI) ap soufle rapidman ak respire rapidman. Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe anseye?
options: Peze kannistè a epi respire dousman ak pwofondman
Itilize de soufle rapid pou pi bon absòpsyon
quiz.rationale: Teknik MDI ki kòrèk mande pou peze kannistè a pandan w ap respire dousman ak pwofondman, apre sa kenbe souf la pou 10 segonn pou pèmèt depo medikaman nan chemen respiratwa yo.

quiz.question: Ki sa ki endike yon agravasyon astma ki ap ogmante ke enfimyè a dwe rapòte?
options: Absans wheezing ak ogmantasyon nan malè respiratwa
Kou fè pwodiktif ak sputum klè
Peak flow nan 80% nan pi bon pèsonèl
quiz.rationale: Po silans (absans wheezing) ak ogmantasyon nan malè endike yon bronkospasme grav ak mouvman lè minimòm. Sa a se yon siy ki menase lavi ki mande entèvansyon imedya.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen tibèkiloz sou mezi prevansyon lè. Ki mask enfimyè a ta dwe mete lè li antre nan chanm nan?
options: Pa gen mask ki nesesè si yo vaksinen
quiz.rationale: TB mande pou mezi prevansyon lè ak yon N95 respirator ki te teste pou anfòm. Mask chirijikal estanda pa filtre nwayo gout ki nan lè a efektivman.

quiz.question: Apre yon kliyan gen yon trakeostomi, ki atik enfimyè a ta dwe asire li nan bò kabann lan?
options: Obturator ak tib trakeostomi ranplasman menm gwosè
quiz.rationale: Yon obturator ak tib trakeostomi ranplasman menm gwosè dwe kenbe nan bò kabann lan an ka deklanchman aksidantèl oswa reinserisyon ijans.

rpn-testbank-neuro.title: RPN Neurological Test Bank
rpn-testbank-neuro.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RPN Neurological Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
rpn-testbank-neuro.pathophysiology: Kesyon pratik siplemantè sou sistèm nève.

quiz.question: Nòt Glasgow Coma Scale yon kliyan desann soti nan 12 a 8. Kisa enfimyè a ta dwe fè?
quiz.rationale: Yon desant GCS de 4 pwen endike yon deteryorasyon nève enpòtan. Yon nòt 8 oswa pi ba endike koma ak potansyèl bezwen pou pwoteksyon airway. Rapòte imedyatman se kritik.

quiz.question: Ki dekouvèt pupil enfimyè a ta dwe rapòte imedyatman?
options: Youn pupil fikse ak dilate (pupil gonfle)
Kontriksyon pupil bilateral nan limyè klere
Ti diferans nan gwosè pupil nan baz
quiz.rationale: Yon pupil fikse, dilate unilateral endike yon ogmantasyon nan presyon intracranial ak posib herniation uncal ki konprese nève kranyal III. Sa a se yon ijans nève.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen yon maladi kriz se preskri phenytoin (Dilantin). Ki dekouvèt enfimyè a ta dwe rapòte?
options: Ataksia, nystagmus, ak pale ki melanje
Ti tèt vire lè li kanpe vit
quiz.rationale: Ataksia, nystagmus, ak pale ki melanje endike toksisite phenytoin. Pandan ke hiperplazi jansiv se yon efè segondè komen, siy toksisite mande pou rapòte imedyatman ak posib tcheke nivo.

quiz.question: Ki aksyon enfimyè a ki gen priyorite pandan yon kriz aktif?
options: Mete yon lam lang pou pwoteje airway la
Reskonsab kliyan an pou evite blesi
Tounen kliyan an sou bò a epi pwoteje tèt la
quiz.rationale: Pandan yon kriz, tounen kliyan an sou bò a pou evite aspirasyon, pwoteje tèt la kont blesi, epi pa janm mete anyen nan bouch la. Tan kriz la epi rapòte.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen meningit pran yon pozisyon ak kou a hyperextended ak do a arch. Kisa sa rele?
quiz.rationale: Opisthotonos se yon hyperextension sevè nan kou ak do ki koze pa iritasyon meningeal. Li endike meningit sevè epi li ta dwe rapòte imedyatman.

quiz.question: Ki evalyasyon enfimyè a ta dwe fè sou yon kliyan apre kraniotomi chak èdtan?
options: Tcheke nève ki gen ladan nivo konsyans
quiz.rationale: Evalyasyon nève souvan (LOC, repons pupil, fonksyon motè/sansory, siy vital) esansyèl pou detekte siy bonè ogmantasyon ICP oswa konplikasyon apre operasyon.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen myasthenia gravis rapòte ogmantasyon feblès apre li te pran pyridostigmine (Mestinon). Kisa sa ka endike?
options: Kriz kolinèjik soti nan twòp medikaman
quiz.rationale: Ogmantasyon feblès apre medikaman anticholinesterase ka endike kriz kolinèjik (twòp medikaman). Siy yo enkli sekresyon twòp, bradycardia, ak feblès nan misk. Sispann medikaman an epi rapòte.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen yon avc gen difikilte pou vale. Kisa enfimyè a ta dwe fè anvan li ofri likid oral?
options: Ofri likid mens pou teste vale
Asire yon evalyasyon vale te fèt
Pozisyon kliyan an plat epi ofri moso glas
quiz.rationale: Yon evalyasyon vale fòmèl (screening vale bò kabann oswa evalyasyon patoloji langaj) dwe fèt anvan nenpòt entak oral pou evite aspirasyon nan kliyan ki gen avc.

rpn-testbank-endocrine.title: RPN Endocrine Test Bank
rpn-testbank-endocrine.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RPN Endocrine Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
rpn-testbank-endocrine.pathophysiology: Kesyon pratik adisyonèl sou sistèm andokrin.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen dyabèt gen yon glikoz san 3.1 mmol/L epi li konsyan. Kisa enfimyè a ta dwe administre?
quiz.rationale: Pou kliyan ki gen ipoglisemi ki konsyan, Règleman 15 la aplike: bay 15g nan idrat kabòn ki aji rapid, tann 15 minit, epi reverifye glikoz la. Ji, tablèt glikoz, oswa soda regilye se apwopriye.

quiz.question: Ki siy ki endike ketoasidoz dyabèt (DKA) ke enfimyè a ta dwe rapòte?
options: Respirasyon pwofon, rapid (Kussmaul) ak souf fwi
quiz.rationale: Respirasyon Kussmaul (respirasyon pwofon, rapid) se tantativ kò a pou elimine CO2 anplis pou konpanse pou asidoz metabolik. Odè souf fwi a soti nan asetòn, yon pwodwi pa keton.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan apre operasyon tiwoyid la rapòte yon santi pikotman alantou bouch la ak dwèt yo. Kisa enfimyè a ta dwe sispèk?
quiz.rationale: Pikotman alantou bouch la ak dwèt yo (parestèzi) endike hypocalcemia, ki ka rive si glann paratiwoyid yo te retire oswa domaje aksidantèlman pandan operasyon tiwoyid la. Rapòte imedyatman.

quiz.question: Ki enstriksyon enfimyè a ta dwe bay yon kliyan ki ap pran levothyroxine?
options: Pran ak manje pou pi bon absòpsyon
Pran sou yon lestomak vid 30-60 minit anvan dejene
Pran nan lè dòmi ak yon ti goute
quiz.rationale: Levothyroxine ta dwe pran sou yon lestomak vid 30-60 minit anvan manje. Kalsyòm, fè, ak antasid entèfere ak absòpsyon e yo ta dwe separe pa 4 èdtan.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen maladi Addison admèt ak vomisman ak dyare. Ki dekouvèt ki pi enkyetan?
quiz.rationale: Kriz Addison a prezante ak ipotansyon grav ak takikardi akoz mank kortisol ak aldosteron. Vomisman ak dyare agrave dezidratasyon ak dezòd elektwolit.

quiz.question: Kisa enfimyè a ta dwe anseye yon kliyan sou chanjman sit pou piki ensilin?
options: Sèvi ak menm sit la chak fwa pou absòpsyon ki konsistan
Woule nan menm zòn anatomi anvan ou deplase nan yon nouvo zòn
Chanje ant bra ak vant o aza
quiz.rationale: Woule nan menm zòn anatomi an (pa egzanp, vant) anvan ou deplase nan yon nouvo zòn bay plis to absòpsyon ki konsistan pandan li anpeche lipodystrophy.

preTest.question: Yon kliyan ki gen sendwòm Cushing gen ki aparans karakteristik?
options: Fas lalin, bouk bèf, ak obezite tronkal
preTest.rationale: Twòp kortisol lakòz redistribisyon grès ki mennen nan fas lalin (fas won), bouk bèf (pad grès dorsocervical), ak obezite tronkal ak ekstremite mens ak striae vyolèt.

rpn-testbank-renal.title: RPN Renal/GI Test Bank
rpn-testbank-renal.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RPN Renal/GI Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
rpn-testbank-renal.pathophysiology: Kesyon pratik adisyonèl sou ren ak GI.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki sou hemodialysis gen yon fistul arteriovenous nan bra gòch la. Ki aksyon enfimyè a dwe pran ki kòrèk?
options: Pran tansyon sou bra gòch la
Palpe pou yon vibrasyon ak auskulte pou yon bri
Aplike yon tourniket sou bra gòch la pou pran san
Itilize bra fistul la pou aksè IV
quiz.rationale: Yon fistul AV ki fonksyone ta dwe gen yon vibrasyon ki palpe (vibrasyon) ak yon bri ki tande (son ki fè bri). Pa janm itilize bra fistul la pou tansyon, tourniket, veniponkti, oswa aksè IV.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen blesi ren akit gen yon nivo potasyòm ki se 6.8 mEq/L. Ki chanjman ECG enfimyè a ta dwe veye?
options: Vag T ki wo ak QRS elaji
quiz.rationale: Hyperkalemia lakòz vag T ki wo ak konplèks QRS elaji. Hyperkalemia grav ka mennen nan fibrilasyon ventrikilè ak arest kadyak. Rapòte ak antisipe tretman ijans.

quiz.question: Ki restriksyon dyetetik enfimyè a ta dwe renfòse pou yon kliyan ki sou dialysis?
options: Dyet ki ba pwoteyin, ki wo nan sodyòm
Restriksyon nan likid ak limite potasyòm, fosfò, ak sodyòm
Dyet ki wo nan potasyòm pou ranplase pèt
Antre likid san limit ant tretman
quiz.rationale: Kliyan ki sou dialysis bezwen restriksyon likid ak limit sou potasyòm (risk kadyak), fosfò (maladi zo), ak sodyòm (retansyon likid). Pwoteyin ki adekwa nesesè pou ranplase pèt pandan dialysis.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen yon katetè urin devlope pipi ki twoub, ki gen yon move sant. Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe fè?
options: Ogmante konsomasyon likid ak irige katetè a
Rapòte sa a kòm li ka endike enfeksyon nan trak urin
Ignore li kòm yon rezilta nòmal ak katetè
quiz.rationale: Pipi ki twoub ak ki gen yon move sant ak yon katetè sijere enfeksyon trak urin ki asosye ak katetè (CAUTI). Rapòte sa a pou analiz pipi ak tès posib pou kilti ak sansiblite.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen siro fwa gen yon ogmantasyon nan distansyon abdominal. Ki sa sa a ka endike?
quiz.rationale: Ascites (akumulasyon likid nan kavite peritoneal) soti nan ipertansyon portal ak diminye pwodiksyon albumin nan siro. Mezire gwosè vant chak jou epi rapòte ogmantasyon.

quiz.question: Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe rapòte nan yon kliyan ki gen yon senyen GI?
options: Pipi nwa, ki gen yon sant (melena)
Ti kantite san sou papye twalèt ki soti nan hemoroid
quiz.rationale: Pipi nwa, ki gen yon sant (melena) endike senyen GI anwo. San an dijere pa asid gastrik ak anzim entesten, ki pwodui koulè nwa a. Rapòte imedyatman epi siveye siy vital.

rpn-testbank-safety.title: RPN Safety & Fundamentals Test Bank
rpn-testbank-safety.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RPN Safety & Fundamentals Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
rpn-testbank-safety.pathophysiology: Kesyon pratik adisyonèl sou sekirite ak fondamantal.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan gen risk pou tonbe. Ki entèvansyon enfimyè a ta dwe aplike an premye?
options: Aplike restriksyon pou ponyèt de bò
Asire ke son apèl la nan men ak kabann lan nan pi ba pozisyon
Mande yon manm fanmi pou rete tout tan
quiz.rationale: Prevansyon tonbe kòmanse ak sekirite anviwònman debaz: kabann nan pi ba pozisyon, fren yo bloke, son apèl la nan men, soulye ki pa glise, ak chemen ki klè. Restriksyon se yon dènye solisyon.

quiz.question: Enfimyè a ap prepare pou administre medikaman. Ki aksyon ki vyole dwa administrasyon medikaman?
options: Tcheke de idantifyan kliyan an anvan administrasyon
Administre yon medikaman san tcheke pou alèji
quiz.rationale: Pa tcheke alèji vyole Dwa Kliyan an sekirite. Dwa administrasyon medikaman yo enkli Dwa Kliyan, Dwa Medikaman, Dwa Dòz, Dwa Wout, Dwa Tan, ak Dwa Dokimantasyon.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan devlope anaflaksi apre li fin resevwa yon antibyotik. Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe administre an premye?
options: Epinephrine (adrenaline) jan yo te bay lòd
quiz.rationale: Epinephrine se premye tretman pou anaflaksi. Li lakòz bronkodilasyon ak vasokonstriksyon, ki ranvèse konpwomèt chemen lè ki menase lavi ak ipotansyon.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen yon tib nazogastrik gen yon volim rezidyèl de 350 mL. Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe fè?
options: Kontinye manje a jan yo te pwograme
Sispann manje a epi rapòte dekouvèt la
quiz.rationale: Yon volim rezidyèl gastrik de 350 mL (souvan se limit 200-500 mL selon politik) sijere yon vide gastrik ki reta. Sispann manje a, retounen rezidyèl la, epi rapòte bay enfimyè ki an chaj.

quiz.question: Ki aparans blesi enfimyè a ta dwe rapòte kòm yon posib enfeksyon?
options: Tisus granilasyon woz nan baz blesi a
Eritèm, chalè, drenaj purulan, ak doulè ki ap ogmante
quiz.rationale: Eritèm (woujès), chalè, drenaj purulan (pous), doulè ki ap ogmante, ak posib lafyèv endike enfeksyon blesi ki mande evalyasyon, kilti blesi, ak posib terapi antibyotik.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan nan yon etablisman swen alontèm refize medikaman yo nan maten. Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe fè?
options: Kase medikaman yo epi kache yo nan manje
Dokimante refi a epi rapòte bay enfimyè ki an chaj
Di kliyan an yo dwe pran medikaman yo
Retire tout manje jiskaske medikaman yo pran
quiz.rationale: Kliyan ki konpetan gen dwa refize tretman. Enfimyè a ta dwe edike sou enpòtans lan, dokimante refi a, epi rapòte bay enfimyè ki an chaj pou swivi.

quiz.question: Ki prekosyon izòlman ki mande yon chanm prive ak koule lè negatif?
quiz.rationale: Prekosyon lè (TB, mòso, varisèl) mande yon chanm izòlman enfeksyon lè ak presyon negatif (AIIR) pou anpeche nwayo gout enfektye yo soti nan sote nan koridò.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan gen yon blesi presyon etap 2 sou sakròm lan. Ki pansman enfimyè a ta dwe antisipe?
options: Gòz sèk ki byen sere nan blesi a
Pansman idrocolloid oswa pansman fwom pou kenbe anviwònman blesi a imid
Pa gen pansman, kite blesi a ouvè a lè
Pansman mouye-a-sèk ki chanje chak èdtan
quiz.rationale: Blesi presyon etap 2 (pèt po pati) benefisye de pansman ki kenbe imidite tankou idrocolloid oswa fwom ki pwoteje kabann blesi a, ankouraje epitelizasyon, ak diminye doulè.

preTest.question: Sit IV yon kliyan montre woujès, chalè, ak yon kòd ki ka santi sou venn lan. Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe sispèk?
preTest.rationale: Woujès, chalè, doulè, ak yon kòd ki ka santi sou venn lan se siy klasik phlebitis (enflamasyon venn). Sispann IV a, aplike konprese cho, epi rapòte.

preTest.question: Lè w ap fè ijyèn men, enfimyè a ta dwe lave men yo pou yon minimòm de konbyen tan?
preTest.rationale: Ijyèn men ak savon ak dlo ta dwe dire omwen 20 segonn (oswa tan pou chante 'Happy Birthday' de fwa) pou efikasman retire mikwòb tranzit.

rpn-testbank-maternity.title: RPN Maternity/Pediatrics Test Bank
rpn-testbank-maternity.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RPN Maternity/Pediatrics Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
rpn-testbank-maternity.pathophysiology: Kèk kesyon pratik adisyonèl sou matènite ak pediatri.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki nan travay gen yon tras batman kè fetis ki montre dekelerasyon anreta. Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe fè?
options: Tounen kliyan an sou bò gòch, sispann oxytocin, epi rapòte
quiz.rationale: Dekelerasyon anreta yo endike ensifizans utèroplasental ak ipoksik fetis. Entèvansyon imedya: pozisyon lateral gòch (amelyore perfizyon plasental), sispann oxytocin, administre oksijèn, ogmante likid IV, epi rapòte.

quiz.question: Yon nouvo fèt gen yon nòt Apgar de 4 nan yon minit. Ki sa sa a endike?
options: Nouvo fèt nòmal ki an sante
Nouvo fèt ki modera ki bezwen entèvansyon
quiz.rationale: Nòt Apgar ki soti nan 4-6 endike depresyon modere ki bezwen stimulasyon, netwayaj chemen lè, ak petèt vantilasyon pozitif-presyon. Re-evalye nan 5 minit.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan postpartum ki mouye yon pad perineal nan 15 minit. Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe fè?
options: Sa a se yon dekouvèt postpartum nòmal
quiz.rationale: Mouye yon pad nan mwens pase yon èdtan endike hemoraj postpartum. Enfimyè a ta dwe masaj fundus utè a, rapòte dekouvèt la, epi swiv siy vital pou chòk.

quiz.question: Yon timoun 2 an ap vini ak tous ki sanble ak aboi ak stridor enspiratwa. Ki sa sa a sijere?
quiz.rationale: Tous ki sanble ak aboi (tankou sele) ak stridor enspiratwa nan yon timoun piti se klasik pou croup viral. Sentòm yo souvan pi mal nan nuit. Imidifikasyon vapè frèt ak corticosteroids se tretman estanda.

quiz.question: Lè w ap evalye yon kliyan pediatrik pou dezidratasyon, ki dekouvèt ki endike dezidratasyon sevè?
options: Fontanelle ki chita, san dlo nan je, ak turgor po ki tend
quiz.rationale: Siy dezidratasyon sevè yo enkli fontanelle ki chita (nan tibebe), absans dlo nan je, turgor po ki tend (diminye elastisite), takikardi, ak pwodiksyon pipi ki siyifikativman diminye.

quiz.question: Yon timoun ki gen yon lafyèv 39.5 C ap resevwa acetaminophen. Enfimyè a remake timoun nan pwa 20 kg. Ki dòz ki apwopriye?
quiz.rationale: Dòz acetaminophen pediatrik se 10-15 mg/kg pou chak dòz. Pou yon timoun 20 kg: 200-300 mg se ranje apwopriye a. Toujou kalkile dòz pediatrik selon pwa.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ansent nan 32 semèn rapòte senyen vaginal san doulè ki fèt toudenkou. Ki sa enfimyè a ta dwe sispèk?
quiz.rationale: Senyen vaginal san doulè, wouj klere nan twazyèm trimès la se karakteristik placenta previa (placenta kouvri os servikal la). Pa fè yon egzamen vaginal. Rapòte imedyatman.

rpn-testbank-mental-health.title: RPN Mental Health Test Bank
rpn-testbank-mental-health.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl RPN Mental Health Test Bank, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki sou lithium rapòte vomisman, tremò, ak vizyon flou. Kisa enfimyè a ta dwe sispèk?
options: Efè segondè nòmal ki pral rezoud
Toksisite lithium ki mande rapò imedya
Dezidratasyon ki pa gen rapò ak lithium
quiz.rationale: Vomisman, tremò gross, vizyon flou, ak ataksia endike toksisite lithium. Ranje terapeutik la etwat (0.6-1.2 mEq/L). Kenbe dòz la, rapòte imedyatman, epi atann yon nivo lithium STAT.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan eksprime ideasyon swisid ak deklare yo gen yon plan ak mwayen. Kisa ki aksyon priyoritè a?
options: Dokimante deklarasyon an epi kontinye chanjman an
Asire obsèvasyon kontinyèl youn-a-youn epi rapòte imedyatman
Mande kliyan an pou pwomèt pa fè tèt yo mal
Kite chanm nan pou rele founisè a
quiz.rationale: Ideasyon swisid aktif ak yon plan ak mwayen se yon ijans sikyatrik. Pa janm kite kliyan an pou kont li. Aplike obsèvasyon youn-a-youn, retire atik ki ka fè mal, epi rapòte imedyatman.

quiz.question: Ki efè segondè medikaman antipsikoz ki mande enfimyè a rapòte ijans?
options: Rijidite nan misk, ipèrtèmi, ak konsyans chanje
quiz.rationale: Rijidite nan misk, ipèrtèmi (>38 C), konsyans chanje, ak enstabilite otonom se siy sendwòm malè neuroleptik (NMS), yon ijans ki menase lavi ki mande entèvansyon imedya.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki gen twoub itilizasyon alkòl admèt ak tremò, diaphoresis, ak ajitasyon 48 èdtan apre dènye bwè yo. Kisa ki ap pase?
quiz.rationale: Tremò, diaphoresis, ajitasyon, takikardi, ak ipèrtansyon 48-72 èdtan apre sispansyon endike retrè alkòl. Suiv ak echèl CIWA-Ar epi gade pou pwogresyon nan delirium tremens.

quiz.question: Lè w ap kominike ak yon kliyan ki ap fè eksperyans ilizyon odyo, ki repons ki terapetik?
options: Di kliyan an vwa yo pa reyèl
Di 'Mwen pa tande vwa yo, men mwen konprann yo reyèl pou ou'
Ignòre kliyan an jiskaske ilizyon yo sispann
Dakò ke ou ka tande vwa yo tou
quiz.rationale: Prezante reyalite san diskite rekonèt eksperyans kliyan an pandan w ap kenbe onètete. Pa janm diskite sou ilizyon oswa fè kòm si ou pataje eksperyans lan.

quiz.question: Yon kliyan ki sou yon SSRI antidepresan pou 3 semèn rapòte li santi li plis enèjik. Poukisa enfimyè a ta dwe enkyete?
options: Ogmantasyon enèji anvan amelyorasyon nan atitid ogmante risk swisid
Kliyan an pa bezwen medikaman an ankò
Sa a se yon siy alèji medikaman
quiz.rationale: SSRIs ka amelyore enèji ak motivasyon anvan yo leve atitid. Sa a kreye yon fenèt danjere kote yon kliyan ki te twò depresif anvan sa kounye a gen enèji pou aji sou panse swisid. Suiv ak anpil atansyon.

nursing-process-adpie.title: Nursing Process (ADPIE) and Clinical Reasoning
nursing-process-adpie.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Nursing Process (ADPIE) and Clinical Reasoning, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Incomplete or rushed assessment leading to missed findings
Cognitive biases (anchoring, confirmation bias) in clinical reasoning
Interruptions during medication administration or critical tasks
Failure to prioritize problems using clinical frameworks
Lack of integration between subjective and objective data
clinicalPearls: Assessment is the most critical step - everything else depends on accurate data collection
Never skip reassessment after an intervention - this closes the nursing process loop
Prioritize nursing diagnoses using ABCs and Maslow's hierarchy: physiological needs first
Clinical reasoning improves with deliberate practice and reflective thinking

vital-signs-red-flags.title: Vital Signs: Red Flags & Rapid Response Triggers
vital-signs-red-flags.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Vital Signs: Red Flags & Rapid Response Triggers, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Failure to trend vital signs over time (looking at single readings in isolation)
Not reassessing vital signs after interventions or status changes
Using incorrect measurement techniques (wrong cuff size, incorrect positioning)
Ignoring subtle changes from patient's individual baseline
Delayed recognition of compensatory mechanisms masking true severity
Failure to correlate vital signs with clinical presentation
Not recognizing that 'normal' vital signs can be abnormal for certain patients
Alarm fatigue leading to delayed response to monitoring alerts
clinicalPearls: Tachypnea (RR > 24) is the single most predictive vital sign for clinical deterioration
A 'normal' blood pressure does not mean the patient is stable - tachycardia may be compensating
Always compare current vital signs to the patient's BASELINE, not just textbook normals
The combination of tachycardia + tachypnea + altered mental status = emergency until proven otherwise

medication-administration-safety.title: Medication Administration: Rights & Safety Checks
medication-administration-safety.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Medication Administration: Rights & Safety Checks, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Interruptions during medication preparation and administration
Failure to verify patient identity using two identifiers
Calculation errors with weight-based or concentration-dependent dosing
Bypassing barcode scanning or other safety technologies
Inadequate knowledge of medication actions, interactions, and contraindications
Transcription errors from verbal or telephone orders
Failure to assess allergies before administration
clinicalPearls: The three checks: verify medication label when pulling from storage, when preparing, and at the bedside before administration
If a patient says 'That doesn't look like my usual pill,' STOP and verify - patients know their medications
Never crush enteric-coated or extended-release tablets - it destroys the protective coating and can cause toxicity
Insulin pens are single-patient use devices - NEVER share between patients even with a new needle

infection-prevention-ppe.title: Infection Prevention & PPE Standards
infection-prevention-ppe.overview: Leson sa a kouvri aspè esansyèl Infection Prevention & PPE Standards, ki gen ladan patofizyoloji, evalyasyon klinik, entèvansyon enfimyè prioritè ak jesyon ki baze sou prèv. Enfimyè yo dwe konprann konsèp sa yo pou bay swen ki an sekirite epi efikas.
riskFactors: Inadequate hand hygiene (the single most important infection prevention measure)
Improper donning or doffing of PPE leading to self-contamination
Failure to identify patients requiring isolation precautions
Reuse of single-use equipment or failure to properly disinfect reusable equipment
Indwelling devices (urinary catheters, central lines, endotracheal tubes)
Immunocompromised patients (chemotherapy, HIV, organ transplant recipients)
Antibiotic overuse leading to resistant organism development
Breaks in sterile technique during invasive procedures
clinicalPearls: Hand hygiene is the single most effective measure to prevent healthcare-associated infections
For C. difficile: use SOAP AND WATER only - alcohol-based sanitizers do not kill bacterial spores
Airborne precautions require a fit-tested N95 respirator, not a surgical mask
PPE doffing is the highest risk moment for self-contamination - follow the sequence carefully
